faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What is the highest paying job in Tourism?
faqs.answer:
Food and Beverage Director and General Manager of a premier international hotel chain hold highest earning position in Tourism industry.
Food & Beverage Director is responsible for managing all parts of organization's food and beverage planning and service like -
menu planning
costing
preparing and presenting food and beverages
adhering to quality and safety requirements

faqs.question: Is there any job scope after doing BJMC course?
faqs.answer:
A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.
Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:
TV channels
Circulation and Public Relations
Central Information Service
Legal Affairs Department
Journals
AIR - All India Radio
News Agencies
Press Information Bureau
Advertising agencies
Broadcasting companies.
Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

faqs.question: Which courses does Xaviers Institute of Business Management Studies, Malad West offer to students?
faqs.answer: Xaviers Institute of Business Management Studies, Malad West has courses such as MMS, Executive MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate, MBA/PGDM, BBA to offer. These courses are in the stream of Business & Management Studies, Hospitality & Travel, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Design, Law, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media, Architecture & Planning. Xaviers Institute of Business Management Studies, Malad West has specializations such as UG Diploma specializations in Operations, Finance, Human Resources, Sales & Marketing, Materials Management, Supply Chain, Travel & Tourism Management, Retail, Fashion Design, Project Management, IT & Systems, Import & Export, Labor & Employment Law, Telecom, Textile Management, Disaster Management, Advertising, Certificate specializations in Chartered Accountancy, Advertising, Telecom, Finance, MBA/PGDM specializations in International Business, Human Resources.

highlights.summary:
Navrachana University admission 2026 is open. Interested students can apply directly through the official website.

college_info.intro:
Navrachana University offers UG, PG, and PhD courses through 5 schools of study, including Business and Law, Engineering & Technology, Liberal Studies and Education, Science, and others. MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Navrachana University in Vadodara offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Electrical & Electronics Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. The university offers an MBA programme that covers the entire spectrum of running a business and explores marketing, finance, HR, operations, and more.
Below mentioned are Navrachana University's popular programmes:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    Navrachana University has affordable fee strcture as compared to other institutes. The fee structure of the programme ranges between INR 60,000- INR 7 lakh. The fee structure includes tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Navrachana University admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy.
faqs.question: Is studying at Navrachana University expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    The annual cost of Navrachana University's Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) programme is INR 2,40,000.Navrachana University is accepting applications for the academic year 2024–25. Furthermore, the UCEED 2024 results for B.Des admissions are already available on the official website (uceed.iitb.ac.in). Navrachana University Vadodara is ranked 571st on the list of NIRF colleges in India. In 2021, the Gujarat State Institutional Rating Framework (GSIRF) ranked the institute as one of the top three private universities and the best in Vadodara. Admission to Navrachana University Vadodara is based on the scores of GUJCET, CLAT, LSAT, CET, JEE-BB. Tech, and CMAT-MMBA, followed by CA-PI. Navrachana University's course offerings include an MBA, B.Tech, B.Des, B.Sc., B.Ed., B.Arch., and B.Sc. in Data Science.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG course at Navrachana University?

faqs.answer: A:    Navrachana University BTech fee structure include the tuition fee and a library deposit. While the tuition fee is payable in semester-wise instalments, the library deposit (refundable) of INR 5,000 is payable only once, at admission. The tuition fee for various BTech specialisations is INR 4.58 lakh for the entire course duration. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A satisfactory college and shapes you to step into the real world.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students should be relatively low as the admissions in our batch reached nearly 30. The current batch is working on their final internships, where people have internships ranging from unpaid to Rs. 15,000 per month, to my knowledge. But that's not exactly a reflection, since students also work as freelancers due to the nature of our course. Top recruitment companies would include production houses, advertising agencies, newsrooms, and brands looking for social media managers or content strategists. 100 percent of students got internships, as they are mandatory. Top roles include content writing, graphic design, social media managers, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA LL.B. - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: A university that has multiple benefits.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't provide 100% placements to all students. They only give placements to those, who maintain their CGPA above 7.5 in different companies. Even the college has multiple recruiters and sometimes they also recruit students in the college only. Internships are provided to all students in the first year, which is a must and compulsory for all students. The average package provided to students is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best thing about the college is the infrastructure only. The college has 3 buildings with aesthetic and beautiful artwork. The hostel mess is also good they serve multiple types of food which is rich in taste. The menu of the canteen keeps on changing as the college has multiple kinds of students who have different tastes.

Navrachana University Vadodara is ranked 571st on the list of NIRF colleges in India. In 2021, the Gujarat State Institutional Rating Framework (GSIRF) ranked the institute as one of the top three private universities and the best in Vadodara. Admission to Navrachana University Vadodara is based on the scores of GUJCET, CLAT, LSAT, CET, JEE-BB. Tech, and CMAT-MMBA, followed by CA-PI. Navrachana University's course offerings include an MBA, B.Tech, B.Des, B.Sc., B.Ed., B.Arch., and B.Sc. in Data Science.

The tuition fee for various BSc (Hons) specialisations ranges between INR 3.46 lakh and INR 5.5 lakh for the entire course duration. It is payable in semester-wise instalments. review_summary.college_name: Navrachana University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The best college in Vadodara.

content.Placements: 100 percent of students got placed from our college. The highest package is 34 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA-6 LPA. All the students got internships in companies like TCS. The top role offered is software engineer. The main head of placement has international connections, which gives placement outside too.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the campus. The library is too big and has access to all the books. Classrooms are well-equipped with an air conditioning unit. There is PG right opposite the college, and the quality of food available is good. Sports are given importance, and the medical facilities provided are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really helpful teachers and good amenities.

content.Placements: 100 percent of students are placed from the batch of 2024. The highest package offered is 34 LPA in the year 2023. The average package is 4–5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, PayPal, etc. Top roles include software development engineer, marketing engineer, and HR roles.
content.Infrastructure: Free and fast Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs and classrooms are properly designed, and the number of students is kept limited. Most classrooms are equipped with air-conditioning systems. The quality of food available in the canteen is amazing, and students love eating there. There is an active committee for sports and activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A satisfactory college and shapes you to step into the real world.

content.Placements: The percentage of students should be relatively low as the admissions in our batch reached nearly 30. The current batch is working on their final internships, where people have internships ranging from unpaid to Rs. 15,000 per month, to my knowledge. But that's not exactly a reflection, since students also work as freelancers due to the nature of our course. Top recruitment companies would include production houses, advertising agencies, newsrooms, and brands looking for social media managers or content strategists. 100 percent of students got internships, as they are mandatory. Top roles include content writing, graphic design, social media managers, etc.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A university that has multiple benefits.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide 100% placements to all students. They only give placements to those, who maintain their CGPA above 7.5 in different companies. Even the college has multiple recruiters and sometimes they also recruit students in the college only. Internships are provided to all students in the first year, which is a must and compulsory for all students. The average package provided to students is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The best thing about the college is the infrastructure only. The college has 3 buildings with aesthetic and beautiful artwork. The hostel mess is also good they serve multiple types of food which is rich in taste. The menu of the canteen keeps on changing as the college has multiple kinds of students who have different tastes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Strong infrastructure, facilities, good placements, but academic experience varies.

content.Placements: Approximately 89% of students secured placements. Over 500 companies participated in the placement drives. More than 600 job roles are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Navrachana University in Vadodara offers a range of facilities to support both academic pursuits and comfortable living for its students. Campus wide Wi Fi connectivity is available, including classrooms, libraries and common areas, uninterrupted internet access. It also provides laboratories equipped with the latest tools and technology. It has specialized labs for engineering, science and computer applications, including 3D printers and simulation software.

lists: Admission to BCA and BBA is based on the scores obtained in the entrance exam conducted by Navrachana University, followed by a Personal Interview (PI)

In case of MBA, candidates are shortlisted for admission through an entrance test conducted within the University or a valid CMAT score
MTech admission is based on a valid GATE score, followed by a PI round
Selection of candidates to MSc (Environmental Science) and B.Ed is based on PI round
Candidates are shortlisted for PhD based on their performance in the PI

faqs.question: What is the accepted entrance exam for MBA admission at Navrachana University?
faqs.answer: Navrachana University's MBA admissions are regulated by theAdmission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC). The committee conducts counselling for MBA admissions in Gujarat. It releases merit lists based on the applicants' CMAT scores. Hence, CMAT is the accepted entrance exam for MBA admissions through ACPC.For admissions under the Management Quota, the university conducts a Written Aptitude Test (WAT). The applicants' performance in Graduation and a PI are also evaluated.

faqs.question: How to apply for BA (Hons) admission in Navrachana University?
faqs.answer: Navrachana University conducts its application/ registration process in online mode. Candidates seeking admission can register through the official website of the university. The application window usually opens between February and July, every year (tentative).On the homepage of the official website, candidates must click on 'Apply now'. They can fill out the registration form on the redirected page. While doing so, they must select their desired BA (Hons) specialisations. The application process is incomplete without submitting the prescribed application fee.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Navrachana University?
faqs.answer: The highest salary recorded during placement drive 2024 at Navrachana University was 34.60 LPA. The average package was 4.4 LPA. The overall placement rate was 89%. Over 600 offers were made from more than 500 companies. faqs.question: What do students say about Navrachana University BTech placements?
faqs.answer: Various students have provided Navrachana University reviews on Shiksha.com. Based on some recently posted reviews, the university placed approximately 89% of its students. Over 500 companies participated in the placement drives and offered more than 600 job roles. The highest CTC was INR 34.6 LPA, the lowest was INR 4.40 LPA. The average CTC was INR 10.17 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies were Paypal, Alembic, MRF, Morris Garage Motors, TCS, Zydus, ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Kotak Bank.

faqs.question: What is the fees for BSc (Hons) at Navrachana University?
faqs.answer: Navrachana University BSc (Hons) fee structure include the tuition fee and a caution deposit. While the tuition fee varies across the BSc (Hons) specialisations offered at the university, the caution deposit (refundable) of INR 10,000 is the same for students enrolled in all specialisations. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Navrachana University admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy.

Further updates are down below:

During the NUV BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 15409 and 50261 for the General HS category students. Among all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering were the most competitive for admission in the General HS category. To view the first and last rounds' cutoff ranks for the General HS catego

hostel.description: Navrachana University has a very good hostel facility for both boys and girls, situated at a distance of around 1.5 kms from the University campus. There is a bus service for commuting from the hostel to the campus at specific intervals and scheduled timings. Allotment of accommodation in the hostel is on first-come-first-served basis. The hostel building has three floors. The ground floor houses the Hostel Warden’s Office, and the classrooms for NavKaushalya, a Navrachana training institute for girls and women (9 am to 6 pm). The first floor houses the boys wing and the second floor houses the girls wing. Both have separate entrances and there are no inter-connections to ensure privacy and security. Around 42 girls and 48 boys can be accommodated in the hostel. Each large, well-ventilated room in the hostel admeasuring 430 sq feet accommodates 6 students. All rooms are furnished with comfortable beds, reading desks and storage facilities for students staying there. There are 6 common washrooms (3 toilets and 3 bathrooms attached with geysers) on both floors. Hostel rooms are cleaned regularly on a daily basis. The public areas in the hostel are monitored by CCTV. There is a common lobby space on each floor separating the boys and girls. The common room has a television for leisure and recreation, and a table tennis playing facility. There is an outdoor throw ball/ volleyball court as well. There is 24 x 7 security at the hostel entrance and all entries are recorded in the security log book. The hostel is supported by a good canteen and a common dining facility which is located on the ground floor. It serves hygienic, vegetarian, freshly made food to all hostelites, at scheduled timings.

library.description: The library is proud to possess more than 12,000 volumes from leading authors of India and abroad. The library subscribes to various national journals in the print format, periodicals and magazines. The Navrachana University’s Library consistently caters to the requirements of students and faculty members of all the programmes of bachelors and masters degree.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Vadodara.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the campus. The library is too big and has access to all the books. Classrooms are well-equipped with an air conditioning unit. There is PG right opposite the college, and the quality of food available is good. Sports are given importance, and the medical facilities provided are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Really helpful teachers and good amenities.
reviews.review_text: Free and fast Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs and classrooms are properly designed, and the number of students is kept limited. Most classrooms are equipped with air-conditioning systems. The quality of food available in the canteen is amazing, and students love eating there. There is an active committee for sports and activities.

reviews.review_heading: A satisfactory college and shapes you to step into the real world.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided on a singular device to each student, classrooms are diversified, from seminar halls to regular classrooms, and even classrooms optimised for different batches. The library is well-connected and has access to numerous academic sources and data-based resources, and it is partnered with the MSU Library. Hostel facilities are available nearby as well as PGs, and the canteen food is passable. Professors often eat at the canteen themselves. The sports room is available, and the medi...

reviews.review_heading: A university that has multiple benefits.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about the college is the infrastructure only. The college has 3 buildings with aesthetic and beautiful artwork. The hostel mess is also good they serve multiple types of food which is rich in taste. The menu of the canteen keeps on changing as the college has multiple kinds of students who have different tastes.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure, facilities, good placements, but academic experience varies.
reviews.review_text: Navrachana University in Vadodara offers a range of facilities to support both academic pursuits and comfortable living for its students. Campus wide Wi Fi connectivity is available, including classrooms, libraries and common areas, uninterrupted internet access. It also provides laboratories equipped with the latest tools and technology. It has specialized labs for engineering, science and computer applications, including 3D printers and simulation software.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy with my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my campus was neat and clean and had all the facilities I needed. The campus was great. There were medical facilities, a sports room, a basketball court, two elevators, and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with my university .
reviews.review_text: I had already visited my University and was amazed by such an awesome infrastructure- Neat and clean floors, classes, labs. Wi-Fi is also available for everyone in campus. Library is big and have pc in it and consists of all amazing knowledgeable books. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Students have access to Wi-Fi throughout the campus, and the labs are clean and well-maintained. The library is spacious and equipped with computers and knowledgeable books. The canteen food is also delicious, and medical facilities are available. The classrooms are air-conditioned, and the washrooms are regularly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: My journey in my incredible college.
reviews.review_text: There are two buildings of our college, and every building is of 6 floors, and now the college is adding 4 more floors. The college provides Wi-Fi for every student, and for the business students, there are 4 ACs in every class. In the college, every class contains big projectors with CCTV cameras and good furniture for sitting. The labs are perfect, and they also take responsibility for cleanliness. The facilities provided in the hostel are free Wi-Fi, a free gym, and one swimming pool.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely More Better than expected, good placements in 2023,good infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is Well maintained, neat and clean and even washrooms are clean. Classroom, labs with good working Pc and Instruments are available. Big library with Informative books and sufficient space to sit and read is there and even computer is installed in library. 
Canteen's Food also Good & Healthy enough to eat and good sports room.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Navrachana University.
reviews.review_text: Some of the classrooms have AC's in them; the labs are in working condition but not that good. Most of the students bring their own laptops. The library has most of the required books, and it is quite big but fills up during exam time. There is no dedicated hostel for the college so I can't comment on that. The canteen of the college is good but again, it is small.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing environment provided by the university. The faculty members are highly qualified.
reviews.review_text: The university provides various different classrooms for different courses. Each class is equipped with projectors for easing the learning and teaching process. Fans in each room and windows for proper ventilation. The lighting is also excellent. Many classes have also been equipped with Air Conditioning facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and classrooms are huge for all the students with comfortable sitting arrangements. Facilities are very good. There are different types of games. It is a very interesting and enjoyable college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty members, helpful nature and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The labs are well maintained and also the classrooms are near and clean with Wi-Fi services and also projector and blackboard for easy understanding and learning. The quality of food is hygienic also the rooms and bathrooms of the hostel are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Best University. Still you need to make efforts in order ripe a fruit out of it.
reviews.review_text: I am getting free Wi-Fi provided by the University. You just need to register it at the office. They are providing us a great speed Wi-Fi. Labs are also well maintained. Regular checking of all instruments and appliances is done. Cleanliness is also maintained. Food quality is also good in mess and canteen. Many games and sports are also played. There is a football court too along with a cricket and a basketball court. Indoor games are available too.

paragraphs: Navrachana University offers a scholarship to meritorious and deserving candidates. The institute offers scholarships based on need and merit. Below-mentioned are the Navrachana University scholarships:

Navrachana University offers a scholarship to a high scholarship record and in need of financial assistance. The scholarship is offered as part of the tuition fee to students whose family's combined income does not exceed INR 8 LPA and have scored a minimum 70% in HSC for UG programmes or 7 CGPA in UG level for PG programmes. Below-mentioned is a description of the scholarship for the various income classes:

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good. Exams and campus life are also good.

content.Placements: On the first day of my college, I saw many students in different courses. I am studying BCA from ITM. This year, they have started one summer internship of 1 month and another in the final year which we have to do internships in the last semester. In education, they support us a lot. I just now finished my summer internship and we are asked to find internships on our own.
content.Infrastructure: I lived in the city only so I never stayed in the hostel. The food is amazing and the mess food is really very good. The canteen is average. Classrooms are big. The college also has a library and one has to issue a library card. We can avail books and notes from it. Labs of the college are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: We have good infrastructure. Event is very good. Bus facility is available, hostel rooms are good.

content.Placements: Students are not placed yet as we are the 2nd batch, and 1st batch is in 3rd year. Our course is 4.5 years. As I told you, seniors are the 1st batch, they are in the 3rd year now. In our university, the highest package is 13.5 LPA for batch students. We have a compulsory internship for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good at the college. I am in the physiotherapy department. We don't have Wi-Fi connection in class but on campus we have Wi-Fi. In hostel also every floor has Wi-Fi. About canteen, we have two canteens, one is Gajibo and 2nd is Tea Post. Mess is different for hosteller. Games are available at any time. We have a hospital on campus.

admission_overview.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission process 2026

paragraphs: ITM SLS Baroda University admission 2026is currently open. ITM (SLS) Baroda offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers diploma courses. To get admission toITM SLS Baroda University, meet the eligibility criteria of the preferred course. The university offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Design, Engineering, Mass Communication & Media, etc. The application process at ITM SLS Baroda University is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutITM SLS Baroda Universitycourse admission2026.

ITM SLS Baroda University courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam and merit basis. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular ITM SLS Baroda University courses:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreITM SLS Baroda University courses

ITM SLS Baroda University has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into ITM SLS Baroda University. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university post where interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the ITM SLS Baroda University programmes is based on merit and entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of ITM SLS Baroda University, before filling out the admission form. Interested candidates can check below the complete ITM SLS Baroda University admission process:
Step 1: ITM SLS Baroda University Application Process
The mode of ITM SLS Baroda University application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill the online application form.
Step 2: ITM SLS Baroda University Selection rounds
ITM SLS Baroda University shortlists candidates either based on merit or entrance exam. After shortlisting candidates, selected candidates receive a provisional admission letter.
Step 3: Final Admission confirmation
To confirm admission at ITM SLS Baroda University, selected candidates need to pay theITM SLS Baroda University feeand visit the university campus for the document verification process.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: ITM SLS Baroda University offers 32 courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels in multiple streams like Management, Engineering, Computer Applications, etc. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for UG courses. Bachelor's degree is required to apply for any of the ITM University PG course. Admission is both merit and entrance-based.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA course at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA is based on CAT/ CMAT score. Additionally, candidates must hold bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ SEBC/ EWS) to apply for MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for MBA is INR 1.80 lakh.

faqs.question: Is studying at ITM (SLS) Baroda University expensive?
faqs.answer: The fee structure is different for various courses at ITM SLS Baroda University. Students can check the course-wise total tuition fee from the table presented below:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 3.9 lakhBBAINR 2.6 lakhMBAINR 1.9 lakh-INR 2.6 lakhBCAINR 1.9 lakhBPharmaINR 4 lakhBScINR 1.6 lakh-INR 3.6 lakhNote:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I apply for BBA (Hons) at ITM SLS Baroda University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent exam from any recognised central/ state board or school can apply for BBA (Hons) course. Additionally, the university will shortlist candidates for BBA (Hons) based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for BBA (Hons) is INR 2.6 lakh.

placement_data.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the official data released by the University, the highest package offered during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024 stood at INR 43 LPA . Further, the average package offered in 2024 was INR 4 LPA . More than 900 companies visited the campus and 90% of the total students were placed during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024.

There is a dedicated team of Training and Placement Cell at ITMBU responsible for suitably placing students according to their Aptitude, Scores, Attendance, Caliber & Competence. To enhance employability, the cell offers: Aptitude/Technical Tests, Internships, Career Tracks, Mock Interviews, and a Placement Office.

at ITMBU responsible for suitably placing students according to their Aptitude, Scores, Attendance, Caliber & Competence. To enhance employability, the cell offers: Aptitude/Technical Tests, Internships, Career Tracks, Mock Interviews, and a Placement Office.

cut_off.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Cutoff 2025: Check GUJCET Round Wise Ranks

description: ITM (SLS) Baroda University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

ITM (SLS) Baroda University GUJCET cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and for all categories and quotas in the form of opening and closing ranks. In 2025, ITM (SLS) Baroda University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, ranged from 29066 to 50185 for students belonging to the General HS quota.

Among all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Information Technology and B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering (Vlsi Design and Technology) were the most competitive for admission in the Genera

GUJCET 2025 cutoff ranks for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course range between 29066 to 50185 in the General HS category. B.Tech. in Information Technology emerged as the most competitive specialisation for admission, with a last round closing rank of 29066 under the HS quota.
To view the detailed cutoff ranks across different categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options provided below:

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

As the GUJCET cutoff 2025 differs for each category and round, the cutoff also changes according to different institutions who accept the GUJCET exam 2025 results for admission to various specialisations. Students who are unable to avail admission to one academic institution can look at other colleges where their attain rank is accepted. To help students in the same, below is a comparison table provided, where students can refine their search according to different quotas, specialisations and ca

hostel_campus.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is really good. Exams and campus life are also good.
reviews.review_text: I lived in the city only so I never stayed in the hostel. The food is amazing and the mess food is really very good. The canteen is average. Classrooms are big. The college also has a library and one has to issue a library card. We can avail books and notes from it. Labs of the college are very good.

reviews.review_heading: We have good infrastructure. Event is very good. Bus facility is available, hostel rooms are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good at the college. I am in the physiotherapy department. We don't have Wi-Fi connection in class but on campus we have Wi-Fi. In hostel also every floor has Wi-Fi. About canteen, we have two canteens, one is Gajibo and 2nd is Tea Post. Mess is different for hosteller. Games are available at any time. We have a hospital on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Every teacher is very free with students.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very neat. Classrooms are very perfect. There is no noise pollution. Wi-Fi was a problem before, but it has been cleared. The library is very huge. Every book is available and easy to access. The library is also clean.

reviews.review_heading: Education-wise, I rate it 8 out of 10.
reviews.review_text: ITM has an amazing campus life with the best faculty. The classrooms, libraries, and labs are very good. There is an issue with the network connection, but the infrastructure of the college is good. As I am a day scholar, I don’t know much about the hostel. However, I have heard from my classmates that the rooms are very good and the canteen food is okay. The management here is somewhat strict, which is necessary for our benefit. The college also has its hospital, which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members keep an eye on every student. Other curricular activities are limited.
reviews.review_text: Currently pursuing BCA. It is the GATEway for an individual in the teaching field, it is open to all students with or without a science background. It will help the overall development of an individual in the teaching field. Some labs are insane and have nice sitting arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best faculty, teaching, and response.
reviews.review_text: This is the best BCA course for a commerce student who wants to study computer science. The canteen facility is excellent, and the food is healthy. Other courses are available at this college, and there are computer science subjects such as programming languages and built communication skills, among others.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: My name is Sweta Singh. I am a student of BCA Sem-2, and the infrastructure is very good. I learn about many languages like C, HTML, DBMS, PYTHON, etc. In this college many activities and sports are performed, different types of functions for celebration different days also. This college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent academic environment campus that truly enhances the college experience.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms have facilities like tables, chairs, fans, whiteboards, a projector, Wi-Fi connection. We have a library. The hostel has two rooms option AC and non AC. The mess food quality is okay, we have a hospital for medical emergencies, also we have a basketball ground, cricket ground, volleyball ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Proper education leads to true success.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for our courses are classes are surrounded by trees which makes the environment positive and refreshing to study and it well lighted and spacious. Our library has an extensive collection of books, research journals, and many more. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic and qualitative. Medical facilities are promptly provided in case of any emergency as we have our hospital. In terms of games and sports. There are various courts available for f...

reviews.review_heading: Good vibes, good campus, and good placements. Overall worth it!
reviews.review_text: The campus is very peaceful and student-friendly for both studying and chilling with friends. The classrooms are spacious enough. Hostel rooms are available in AC and non-AC in both options also including meals like breakfast lunch and dinner daily. The university has its hospital providing service to students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good education provides good success.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my university is amazing with lush green fields and with various eye-catching cultures. Our university has various amenities for sports enthusiastic students like a cricket ground, basketball court, and badminton court. There is an amazing gazebo in our university to utilize in our free time.

reviews.review_heading: Best choice for pursuing MBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good. We have a clean water facility, library facility, canteen facility, and classes with very comfortable seating arrangements. Also, we have a place like Gazibo to chit-chat with our friends. So ITM provides great infrastructure to its students.

reviews.review_heading: As a MBA student I'm absolutely satisfied with the teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well developed. Classrooms are equipped with projectors which enhance learning experience. The campus is clean, well maintained, and provides professional atmosphere. The canteen deserves special mention and it offers good food at reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: MBA programme is for better future & placement.
reviews.review_text: The university has labs and a library. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It offers good quality hygienic food, and the campus is also very aesthetic. The campus has very good vibes & location.

reviews.review_heading: It provides great courses and a decent stay as well.
reviews.review_text: Labs and infrastructure are modern. Hostels are clean and secure. It offers decent and tasty food. It should improve in Wi-Fi and recreation facilities for better students comfort.

college_info.college_name: Times and Trends Academy, Chinchwad

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Times and Trends Academy, Chinchwad Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It has excellent management, teaching faculty members and good exposure to current design trends.

review_content.Placements: The internship program starts after you finish your 1st year of the course. Our institute has tie-ups with many firms for recruitment. Most of the students are well-placed when they complete their course. Students get good exposure to real-time projects, and they are ready to take up new projects as they are out of college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and all study materials are available as per students' requirements. The library facility with a variety of study references is available in the institute, which helps students to gain extra knowledge. Spacious classrooms and also facilities are available for digital learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Event Management - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest you just be positive and join this academy. You will find your own ways to grow.

review_content.Placements: Placements totally depend on how much effort you make to gain knowledge of your field and how many contacts you make as well. In the end, every student gets jobs, but it depends on you that how much money you earn. The main thing in the event management industry is how you utilise your talent.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice here. Everything is provided which we need to have in any academy. Classrooms are neat and clean, and they take proper care of maintaining hygiene. Extra activities are conducted on every occasion. Even there is a kitchen for some purposes, which are rarely needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It has very good and friendly faculty, and good placements in 2018, and I miss my college days.

review_content.Placements: I got placed in Zolostays Property Solutions as a design consultant intern, and by reviewing my performance, I got placed as a permanent employee there, with a starting package of 2.25 LPA. It was a campus placement, and it was my 1st interview to start my career.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms are available. Software training and practice labs are available. The staff are always available to help us. They are friendly too.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and friendly. They were ready to help us whenever we ask and provided real-life guidance. The course included live examples and market study for upcoming trends and material. Site surveys are conducted for us to gain onsite knowledge. They encourage us by organising different exhibitions, where we can showcase our creativity.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in VFX - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: TTA Chinchwad helps me alot to grow up with my career.

review_content.Placements: From our batch, 6 people out of 10 are got selected off-campus. I got selected as a Creative Production Manager at Duty Corp at the package of Rs 3.5 lakh/ year. I don't know about the current student's placement because of covid, I came back to my home town and currently, I started my own production company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and high tech classrooms. Cooperative teachers with experience. Extra classes are available for personality development and self-growth. Industrial visits and guest faculty are there for industrial training.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata, are B.Des and M.Des. The institute provides various courses such as B.Des in Visual Communication & Digital Design, B.Des in Game Art & Design, B.Des in Digital Product Design, B.Des in Animation and Motion Design, and M.Des in Advertising, Design & Digital Communication. The institute offers undergraduate courses with a duration of four years and postgraduate courses with a duration of two years. A basic eligibility criterion to secure admission to any of the courses at Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata, is to have passed Class 12 from a recognized board such as CBSE, ISC, or WBCHSE Check out the Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata popular programmes:

placements.overview: The 2024 placements have successfully concluded. The highest and average packages stood at INR 45 LPA and INR 15 LPA, respectively. As per the records, 98% of the graduates have found a job in 6 months. The list of recruiters that were part of Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata placements in recent years included Google, Capgemini, Deloitte, and many others.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata provides various UG, PG and Integrated courses with the duration of 3-5 years. It offers specialisations in BDes such as Visual Communication and Digital Design, Game Art and Game Design and Digital Product Design. Moreover, the Institute also offers a PG Diploma in Advertising, Design and Digital Communication for the duration of 18 months with 30 seats in total. Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata fee structure for a BDes programme consists of tuition fees and hostel fees for a period of 4 years. A candidate can pursue BDes for 4 years with the total fee structure of , while a PG Diploma can be opted for . Below given are the

faqs.answer: A:    Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata admissions are entirely merit-based. Candidates are admitted based on their past academic merit obtained in Class 12/ UG degree. Direct admissions are offered to candidates who meet the basic education requirements of the programme they are applying for.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam required for admission to courses at Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata?

faqs.answer: A:    Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata offers BDes and PG Diploma at a cost of INR 7 Lakh - INR 12 Lakh. The course fees varies with the level and duration of the course. The Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata consists of one time fees and recurring expenses that the candidates have the provision to pay semester-wise or annually. However, it may vary as per the Institutional norms and regulations.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing experience; best faculty.

review_content.Placements: In Game Art Design, placement is tough but rewarding. Students often do internships and then take on full-time jobs at our game development studio as game designers. We have a partnership with Ubisoft India. Students get internships in the company in India and abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Courses are highly curriculum-related. Classrooms are spacious and clean for us to spread our sheets and start drawing. There is a strong Wi-Fi connection. The only complaint is that it would be better to have a medical room with some supplies of first-aid, some electrolytes, and paracetamol in college, and even just a place to go and take some rest when we are feeling unwell. The hostel facility is not available to me.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Des. in Advertising, Design and Digital Communication - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Intuitive, superior and polished college.

review_content.Placements: The overall placement record is very appreciated by a lot of reputable companies and internships are promoted by the academic staff itself for hands-on studio experience. Roles are varied and can range from a number of high-paying positions that well deserve the training that is done by the academic fraternity.
review_content.Infrastructure: The institute is well-equipped with modern basic utilities with spacious compartments and has intricately designed classes that set it apart from other educational colleges. Overall, it's quite solid and well maintained as a foreign design college.

admission_process.title: Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata admission is open for various courses. The institute provides admission toUG and PG coursesin the field of Design. Admission is entrance-based for all UG and PG courses. To be eligible for admission, applicants must fulfil the criteria set by the college. Applicants willing to apply for any must apply online byEcole Intuit Lab, Kolkata'sofficial website for admission. Read the below article to learn more about theEcole Intuit Lab, Kolkata admission process 2025:
The key highlights related to Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata admission 2025 are in the table below:
Particulars
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular
Programmes offered
2 programmes
Admission status 2025
How to apply
www.ecole-intuit-lab.co.in/campus/kolkata/
Popular courses
BDes | MDes
Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata Brochure 2025

Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata provides BDes and MDes programmes. Admission to the courses is done through aCreative Intelligence Testconducted by the institute, followed by aPersonal Interview (PI)and Portfolio submission round. Further, the college also accepts NIFT/UCEED entrance exams for admission to BDes and MDes courses. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for the courses they are applying for. Given below areEcole Intuit Lab, Kolkata courseeligibility and selection criteria:

Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata admission criteriaare completely entrance-based. Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria can take the NIFT entrance exam and UCEED exam to get a seat in the desired programme. The admission process broadly involves online registration, entrance test, result declaration, counselling and seat allotment. For the candidate's reference, each of the stages in theEcole Intuit Lab, Kolkata admission processis explained below:
Step 1: Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata Application Process 2025

Candidates who fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria can fill out the application form. Eligible students can fill out the application form through the Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata official website.
Step 2: Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata Selection Criteria 2025

Candidates will have to take the creative intelligence test conducted by Ecole Intuit Lab, Kolkata followed by a Personal Interview and Portfolio Evaluation. Further, the college also accepts NIFT and UCEED exams for admission to UG and PG courses. Those who qualify for all the aforementioned selection rounds will be selected for the final admission process.
Step 3: Ecole Intuit Lab Kolkata Final Seat Allotment 2025

Once the selection process is complete, selected candidates need to pay theEcole Intuit Lab, Kolkata course feeto confirm their seat in the college. Aspirants also need to bring the specified documents for verification.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and would recommend joining it.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our course. It is a paramedical course and these technicians play a major role in diagnosing various alignments. The average salary package offered is 1 LPA to 5 LPA. Placements are provided in both government and private hospitals in our course. The roles offered are research technician, lab consultant, technologist, research assistant, lab analyst, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are convenient for students to study. Hostels are built inside and outside the institute. Food served in the hostel is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Fashion Technology (Advance) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is the right place to pursue fashion designing.

review_content.Placements: I have done an advanced Diploma in fashion technology from YWCA. The packages offered are good (1.5 to 5 LPA). The teachers train the students for interviews. Around 70 to 80% of students got placed. I got placed in Uniform Bucket as a fashion merchandiser.
review_content.Infrastructure: YWCA is a pocket-friendly place, where you can get really good knowledge, both theoretical and practical. The teachers are good and friendly. Computer and personality development classes are also conducted with the course. I am from Meerut. I shifted to Delhi and stayed in the YWCA hostel. The hostel is a perfect place to stay for college students. Mess and all the other facilities are good.

This degree provides a broad understanding of the Aviation industry, covering topics such as aviation regulations, safety, management, and operations. Graduates with this degree can pursue careers as pilots, air traffic controllers, airport managers, and more.

review_summary.college_name: YWCA Women’s Training institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Interior Designing (Advance) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The fee structure of this college is not reasonable.

content.Placements: Many students got internships in this course. Placements are decent. There are no top recruiting companies that visit our college for recruitment. Top roles are offered in this course. Few students got unpaid internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. The library is not available. Computer laboratory is average. The food served in the hostel is good. Sports are not conducted. Medical facilities are not available. Washrooms are average. Classrooms are not well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma In Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college and would recommend joining it.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our course. It is a paramedical course and these technicians play a major role in diagnosing various alignments. The average salary package offered is 1 LPA to 5 LPA. Placements are provided in both government and private hospitals in our course. The roles offered are research technician, lab consultant, technologist, research assistant, lab analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are convenient for students to study. Hostels are built inside and outside the institute. Food served in the hostel is average.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Fashion Technology (Advance) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the right place to pursue fashion designing.

content.Placements: I have done an advanced Diploma in fashion technology from YWCA. The packages offered are good (1.5 to 5 LPA). The teachers train the students for interviews. Around 70 to 80% of students got placed. I got placed in Uniform Bucket as a fashion merchandiser.
content.Infrastructure: YWCA is a pocket-friendly place, where you can get really good knowledge, both theoretical and practical. The teachers are good and friendly. Computer and personality development classes are also conducted with the course. I am from Meerut. I shifted to Delhi and stayed in the YWCA hostel. The hostel is a perfect place to stay for college students. Mess and all the other facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Office Management - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Perfectly satisfied from YWCA of Delhi.

content.Placements: About 50 students were in my class and there were four sections of office management course. 40-50 students were in each section. When I was studying in YWCA. I did the internship also for one month in central Water Commission (CWC) and after completing the course minimum package offer was 15-20 thousand. When I completed the course before that only the covid pandemic started so till the lockdown no placement was provided but I am fully satisfied that even after one year of passing out from the college the teachers and the placement department is still in touch with us and are still providing the required jobs. Each and every student got internship from the college as it's compulsory for every student to do internship before completing the course and the companies were Dabor Ltd. , Central Water Commission, BSES. Office coordinator, office assistant, front office executive, these were the roles offered.

Chitkara University Rajpura MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, Brand Manager, Customer Relationship Manager, and others. Chitkara University Punjab provides accelerated career growth in Marketing careers. MSc students are given internship opportunities and also provided campus recruitment opportunities.

review_summary.college_name: Chitkara University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering with Specialisations - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Chitkara University: The Place to Explore Your Potential.

content.Placements: Placements at Chitkara University are excellent and well-structured. For my batch/course, around 80-90% of eligible students were placed, with many receiving multiple offers. Top companies like Amazon, Deloitte, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., come.
content.Infrastructure: Perfect facilities and infrastructure; everything is up to date and all classes have Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned, the library is great and has a separate Wi-Fi, sports, games, and every facility is fantastic. Lovely atmosphere, love this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent in every field, do check it out.

content.Placements: So, talking about the placements, about 1/3rd of the students are placed in the placement session. The companies that came for this include Uno Mind, HCL, and Infosys. Some private limited companies are also included in it. The average package that is offered is 5 LPA for different roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here at the university is well-equipped, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but you have to authenticate it with the credentials provided by the university to connect to the Wi-Fi. The university has a central library as well, where students can do self-study. The hostel provides decent facilities, and food at the mess is average to good. The medical facility of the dispensary is also provided here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. with ACCA - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Overall, students were placed who have skills and industry-based knowledge. The highest package was 12 LPA and the average was 6 LPA. Top companies like KPMG, EY, and PwC offered top roles such as senior manager and accounts manager. Almost all students got internships through college referrals.
content.Infrastructure: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.

content.Placements: ? 90%? The highest was of 18 Lacs the lowest of 4-5 Lacs? Tcs, hcl microsoft? 95%? Analyst, manager Chitkara? S BBA programme is known for strong industry connections so students get opportunities across business, finance, marketing, operations, HR and analytics.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Software Engineering with Deakin University - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good facilities for the students in the classrooms as well in the hostels.

content.Placements: A good percentage of students were placed in my course, and the average package is around 8-9 Lacs. Top roles like data scientist and software engineer are offered. Companies like Service now, appreciate, uno mind, etc. Visit our campus every year, and many students get internships and jobs in these companies.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility for the students is well provided and well maintained in hostels as well as classrooms, a decent quality of food is available in the hostel mess, and a good food court is also available. There are 2 libraries one for the whole college and one specifically for the global students.

paragraphs: Chitkara University, Chandigarh'sadmission process is open for all courses. The university contains various steps, including filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Check below the detailed steps of Chitkara University, Chandigarh, admission 2025:
1- Application Process 2025

Candidates must apply and appear for entrance exams accepted by the university for admission. Further, candidates must fill out the application form online and offline by visiting the campus physically.
2- Selection Round

Chitkara University, Chandigarhselects candidates for all courses based on various entrance exams such as JEE Main, SLAT, PTE and others. The college also conducts PI and GD rounds for admission to some UG and PG courses including MBA, BCA, BBA and others.
3- Allocation of Seats

The seats in the various programmes will be allotted based on merit- ranking of the student in the specified entrance test subject to fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria for the programme and the preferences indicated in the counselling form at the time of counselling (as per availability of seats).
4- Payment and confirmation of seats

Those who are offered admission are required to pay the fees. Any kind of cheque shall NOT be accepted. All enrolled students have to pay their fees twice a year in the months notified by the university. Delayed payment of fees will attract a fine as per the rules and regulations of the University.
For more information about Chitkara University, Chandigarh Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech admission at Chitkara University?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers 11 full-time BTech programmes in the stream of Business and Management Studies, Engineering and IT & Software. It is a UG-level course and the selection criteria is the JEE Main entrance score. The eligibility criteria for the course is Class 12 with 60% aggregate. The duration ofChitkara University BTechis four years and the lateral entry duration is three years. A total of ten BTech courses are offered by CIET and four BTech Lateral Entry courses are offered by CCAE.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Chitkara University for BTech?
faqs.answer: To get BTech admission at Chitkara University, the candidate need to meet the minimum educational qualification as per course requirement. The candidate should pass Class 12 with 60% aggregate or secure 60% in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics. The selection criteria for the course isJEE Mains score. Overall, BTech is a four-year programme at Chitkara University.

faqs.question: How many marks are necessary for B.Tech at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering, Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University does not provide any additional entrance examination for admission. There are two main criterias for B.Tech. First of all, the candidates must pass their 10+2 with a minimum of 60% marks of the total marks (mandatory subjects are Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics) in any stream. And secondly, candidates are required to appear in national-lavel entrance examination, for example JEE Main (mandatory for 2023 batch).

faqs.question: What is the reality of Chitkara University placements?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During Chitkara University placements 2023, over 1,150 BTech students were placed during Chitkara University placements. The institute attracted more than 670 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to the Engineering students across sectors, such as Assurance, IT, Education, Operations, Sales and Marketing, etc. Further, the highest and average package offered during Chitkara University MBA placements in 2023 was INR 44 LPA and INR 9 LPA, respectively. faqs.question: Does Chitkara University offer placements abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes, Chitkara University offers placements both internationally and nationally. The top companies who visit the campus are Amazon, Adobe, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, etc. Students get an opportunity to work in areas of IT, Education, Consulting, E-Commerce, etc. In 2023 placement drive, the highest package given among BTech students was INR 1.11 Crore per annum. For the MBA students, the highest package was INR 44 LPA and INR 9 LPA was the average package.

faqs.question: Is Chitkara University, Chandigarh hard to get?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers a wide range of courses at the UG, PG and PhD level. faqs.question: What is the fee of B.Com course at Chitkara Business School?
faqs.answer: The overall fees of an BCom in Chitkara Business School irange from INR 3.6 lakh to INR 3.8 lakh , tuition fees for three years. faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA/PGDM at Chitkara Business School Chandigarh?

The 2 year full-time MBA course is offered in 9 specialisations, namely Marketing, Finance, Logistics & Supply Chain, Business Analytics, Human Resource Management, HealthCare, Retail Management, Pharmaceutical Management, and Banking, Financial Services and Insurance. Candidates need to take a national level entrance exam, such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT or NMAT to take admission.

faqs: What is the cutoff of Chitkara University?
description: Chitkara University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the B.Sc in Hospitality Administration course. The universi accepts the NCHMCT JEE entrance exam for selecting students. Candidates seeking admission can scroll down to check the year and round-wise cutoff trends. A few more updates are below:

Chitkara University NCHMCT JEE cutoff 2025 for admission to the BSc in Hospitality Management course was 4062 in the last round, for the students belonging to the General AI quota. The first round closing rank for the same course was 6366. Check out the table below:

Chitkara University cutoff 2025 has been released for NCHMCT JEE across different rounds and categories. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff rank for the B.Sc. in Hospitality Administration course was 4062. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 987, while in 2023, it was 9338. So, comparing the cutoff data for admission to the BSc course, Chitkara University saw a fluctuating trend over three years.

Candidates planning to appear for next year's exam must go through the NCHMCT JEE cutoff marks of the latest and previous years to get an idea of admission chances at Chitkara University. Students can view or download the round and year-wise cutoff PDF lists to understand the past years' cutoff trends for B.Sc in Hospitality Administration admission.

highlights.description:
Chitkara University is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #78 in the University category, #89 under Engineering, #78 under Management, #16 under Pharmacy, and #38 under Architecture & Planning. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #1201-1400 to Chitkara University. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Chitkara University rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Chitkara University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Chitkara University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University climbed 12 ranks to #78 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Chitkara University climbed 5 ranks to #89 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University fell 24 ranks to #78 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook, Chitkara University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system. In the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University fell 1 rank to #4 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

qs_world.description:
Chitkara University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Chitkara University's rank is #1201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Chitkara University climbed 74 ranks to #325 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Chitkara University climbed 30 ranks to #75 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
