reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University: The Place to Explore Your Potential.
reviews.review_text: Perfect facilities and infrastructure; everything is up to date and all classes have Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned, the library is great and has a separate Wi-Fi, sports, games, and every facility is fantastic. Lovely atmosphere, love this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent in every field, do check it out.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here at the university is well-equipped, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but you have to authenticate it with the credentials provided by the university to connect to the Wi-Fi. The university has a central library as well, where students can do self-study. The hostel provides decent facilities, and food at the mess is average to good. The medical facility of the dispensary is also provided here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara Business School, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara Business School, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

reviews.review_heading: Really good facilities for the students in the classrooms as well in the hostels.
reviews.review_text: Every facility for the students is well provided and well maintained in hostels as well as classrooms, a decent quality of food is available in the hostel mess, and a good food court is also available. There are 2 libraries one for the whole college and one specifically for the global students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University has a good environment overall.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. The buildings and the park are well maintained. Hygiene is maintained overall on the campus. Regular maintenance and cleaning happen. Even the hostels are looked after if students face any issues regarding light or electronics.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with my college option.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is of very good quality. All the stuff is in very good condition, and the staff is also very cooperative. The labs are properly furnished and kept neat and clean. The food quality is nice, and it is regularly checked for safety measures for the future.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Offers practical, industry-focused learning with good faculty and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: Both CSE buildings are well maintained, with air-conditioned lecture halls and good seating. Wi-Fi works well. There is also a decent-sized library. Almost every sport is available, with proper equipment and gear. The gym is good overall.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great exposure and opportunities, but be ready for the discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the overall campus is really good and provides you with the best services that you pay for. The mess food is still better than a lot, and mostly good. The water is clean, and the hostel has vending machines for your service, even the academic buildings are well built and maintained. They are a bit strict in matters of applying for a gate pass to even step outside the campus, and the hostel rules are made a bit stricter.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Know about my Chitkara University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. Labs are well-maintained, and all facilities are available. From Wi-Fi to food quality is good. Mess is in a good location inside the campus. The library is separate for every building. In the hostel, good furniture and other requirements are provided as needed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Discover your potential at Chitkara University. Opportunities await you.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, brilliant classrooms, big libraries with every book on each and every topic taught available. No idea about the hostel, though, as I'm a day scholar, but the sports facilities are to the students' benefit. Overall, the institute offers you the best facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: MBA mean Chitkara University.
reviews.review_text: They have very well-maintained infrastructure with separate classrooms and a separate library for every department. They have world 5G Wi-Fi on every floor. They have indoor games on campus along with a big swimming pool available on a rental basis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University MBA marketing.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are in a good location and have all the facilities required by the students. They have their own rule, like they close the gate at 9:30 and open it at 5:00, for the better performance of students and to maintain the integrity of the college. They have a full hygienic canteen mess and have medical facilities for every student.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college has an MBA in marketing course.
reviews.review_text: Good library and good area. It has its own mass canteen cafeteria and many more inside the boundary and on the main campus. Getting all the facilities, from drinking water to washrooms. The hostel's infrastructure is very luxurious, with both AC and non-AC rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 20 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life is amazing, but the cost is too high for the boys' hostel. They provide every facility, from Wi-Fi to cleaning. They also provide a variety of menus in the large dinner and breakfast menus. They also provide quality of life, and the food is of high quality.

likes.text: The companies like Amazon, Wipro, Microsoft, Infosys, HCL, TCS, and many other MNCs visit our campus for the recruitment.
The top roles offered in our course are full-stack developer, software developer, back-end developer, data scientist, and data engineer.
The placement of Chitkara University is very good and there are a large number of companies which come for recruitment.

college_info.college_name: Chitkara University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Chitkara University grants admissions to students with scholarships offered by the Punjab government and AICTE. To avail of these scholarships, students shall meet the minimum eligibility criteria. These scholarship schemes are introduced to provide financial aid to students belonging to minorities, SC/OBCs, or from Jammu and Kashmir. Chitkara University accepts scholarship students for a lot of its courses.
DFP-Banner
The criteria for the scholarships offered by the government bodies are presented below in a tabular form:
Scholarship
Eligibility Criteria
Post-matric Scholarship Scheme by Punjab Government (SC/OBC’s)
Central Sector Scholarship Scheme

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jindal School of Design and Architecture offers various Undergraduate courses in the fields of Architecture and Design. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria to be able to apply for the JSDA courses. At the UG level, the institute offers BArch, BA, and BDes courses. At the PG level, the institute offers MArch and MA programmes to the students. Jindal School of Art and Architecture eligibility varies from course to course. Candidates can refer to the information below to know about Jindal School of Design and Architecture courses and Jindal School of Design and Architecture fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The Jindal School of Art and Architecture (JSAA) requires candidates to have a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, and at least 50% marks in aggregate in Class 12.  Candidates are selected based on marks obtained in the entrance exam, followed by counseling. The final admissions are based on the candidate's personal statement, supplemental questions, class 10 and 12 results, NATA/JEE score, JCAT & Portfolio & Interview performance.
faqs.question: Can I get into Jindal School of Art and Architecture M.Arch with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Jindal School of Design and Architecture does have an entrance exam for the BA course. NATA/ UCEED are few of the national level exams accepted by the institute. Students should qualify any one of the entrance exam for BA admission. However, candidates without a valid score on these exams can take the entrance exams conducted by the OP Jindal Global University JCAT (Jindal Creative Aptitude Test). The school further shortlists candidates based on exam scores. Shortlisted candidates for the BA course have to then appear for the interview round. To get a call for an interview & portfolio, candidates must score 50% marks in JCAT Part A.
faqs.question: Does Jindal School of Design and Architecture have entrance exam for BA?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the Jindal School of Art and Architecture (JSAA) accepts JEE Main Paper 2 as an entrance exam for admission into its Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch) program. The minimum qualifying marks for JEE Main Paper 2 is 90 percentile. The expected qualifying marks percentile for 2024 is 75 and above for general.  Other entrance exams that JSAA accepts include:NATA/JEE Main-IIUCEED/SAT/ACTJSAT (Jindal Scholastic Aptitude Test)JCAT (Jindal Creative Aptitude Test)  JSAA also shortlists candidates based on exam score.
faqs.question: Is JEE required for B.Arch at Jindal School of Art and Architecture?

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of tuition for the B.Arch degree at O.P. Jindal Global University's Jindal School of Design and Architecture is INR 3,00,000 per year. Apart from the tuition, there's an annual hostel charge of INR 3,10,000 and a one-time refundable security deposit. Thus, the total cost of the JSDA B.Arch programme would be INR 15.50 Lacs for dormitory fees and INR 20.00 Lacs for tuition. For the most precise and recent cost information, it is advised to check out the official website or get in touch with the university directly.
faqs.question: What is the fee for Jindal School of Design and Architecture?

review_content.Placements: Since the school is only two years in running it doesn't have a graduating batch yet. However, as far as internships are concerned there are plenty of opportunities. Almost every student does an internship in the first year itself and our faculty help us in connecting with organisations that work towards our areas of interest. Additionally, the college invites professionals from the field to give talks or conduct workshops every week that allows us to meet and engage with people who are practitioners in the field. We are encouraged to keep in touch with these professionals which are great internship opportunities in themselves.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, even better faculty.

review_content.Placements: Since Jindal School of Art and Architecture is a relatively new school, and is only in its second running year, no batch has graduated from here yet. However, keeping in mind the professionals from various fields who come in to conduct workshops and discussions, the students are encouraged to keep in touch with them for further opportunities. (The rating for placements is for the internship opportunities).
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole campus of OP Jindal Global University is Wi-Fi enabled, with fairly decent speed. The hostels are comfortable, and any infrastructural problems (such as plumbing or electrical issues) are taken care of as soon as they are reported. The hostels are also very clean and hygienic, and the students can call for the staff members to clean the rooms when required via an app. The food served in the mess halls, catered by Sodexo, is nutritious and tasty, and the students also get to pick from 3 cuisines for each meal! However, if one doesn't feel like it, the corner shops and the food court is also available to pacify those hunger pangs. The facilities that JSAA provides to its students are unlike anywhere else in the country. Not only do the students have their own studio spaces to personalize and work in, there is also a construction lab with heavy power machinery, and a digital lab with printers for various sizes of paper, for the students to use whenever they please!

review_content.Placements: Architecture colleges do not usually offer placements after graduation, but JSAA offers a list of internships for those students who apply during the semester breaks. They also promote internships in this college.

review_content.Faculty: Teachers are good in our college. They not only teach the basic theory of the course but also give us on-field knowledge through working on live projects with actual clients. They give us the freedom to explore our different interests through the assignments.

admission_process.title: Jindal School of Design and Architecture Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The Jindal School of Design and Architecture admissions is a multi-step procedure. Aspirants seeking admission are first required to apply by completing the application form to become eligible for admission. For student's reference, each of the stages in the Jindal School of Design and Architecture admission procedure is explained below:
Application Process

The school accept applications via online mode. Eligible students can register and fill out the application form at (jgu.edu.in/admissions-jindal-school-of-art-and-architecture/). Candidates should fill in all the details correctly in the form. Along with this, candidates also have to provide a personal statement. Moreover, the application must be submitted before the deadline.
Selection Rounds

Jindal School of Design and Architecture accept scores of national-level exams like NATA/ UCEED. However, candidates without a valid score on these exams can take the entrance exams conducted by the OP Jindal Global University - JCAT (Jindal Creative Aptitude Test). The school further shortlists candidates based on exam scores.
Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates can pay the required fee amount to confirm their seats.
Download OP Jindal Global University UG Prospectus 2026

faqs.answer: Yes, students can get admission at Jindal School of Design and Architecture without NATA. JSDA accepts scores from other national-level exams like JEE Main-II, UCEED, JCAT (Jindal Creative Aptitude Test), etc. Aspiring candidates must qualify the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course.

faqs.question: Is JEE required for B.Arch at Jindal School of Art and Architecture?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Jindal School of Art and Architecture (JSAA) accepts JEE Main Paper 2 as an entrance exam for admission into its Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch) program. The minimum qualifying marks for JEE Main Paper 2 is 90 percentile. The expected qualifying marks percentile for 2024 is 75 and above for general.Other entrance exams that JSAA accepts include:NATA/JEE Main-IIUCEED/SAT/ACTJSAT (Jindal Scholastic Aptitude Test)JCAT (Jindal Creative Aptitude Test)JSAA also shortlists candidates based on exam score.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jindal School of Design and Architecture Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The University’s hall of residence for students consists of several blocks of building designed by a French architect. There are corridors, open spaces and common rooms within each blocks. There are separate blocks for male and female students. The accommodation for students in these blocks follows international norms and the room are aesthetically furnished. Hygiene is an important consideration in these Halls. In addition, the campus provides recreational facilities including a gymnasium and other indoor and outdoor games. The surrounding are fully landscaped with lawns, bushes and trees.
facilities: Built Environment Studies Jindal Pathway BA Hons Degree
Jindal Adelaide Architecture Pathway BA Hons Degree
Interior Environments Westminster Pathway BDes Degree

library.description: The Library has a collection of about 48000 print volumes and an array of electronic resources. The print collection includes books, monographs, research reports, law reports, and back volumes of periodicals etc. In addition to professional reading, the library provides a good amount of leisure reading and books for soft skills development. All subjects related to the University's academic and research programmes have been included in the collection. Print resources of the library have been divided into general collection and reference collection.

A wide range of Vegetarian and Non-vegetarian food options are thus available for the benefit of the Students, Faculty, Staff and Guests/Visitors of JGU. The university also has the Tuck Shops like Coffee Café Day, Juice N More and Nescafe.

reviews.review_heading: Great exposure, even better Faculty!
reviews.review_text: The studios are well-equipped and each student has their own workspace. These are open till 1 am and open at 6 am to allow us to work whenever we like. Additionally, there is a digital lab, construction and fabrication lab with all the materials we require. Mess services are pre-paid and are common for the whole university. Situated in different parts of the academic block, the dining halls are managed by Sodexo and there is always a lot of variety to choose from, be it Indian, Chinese or contin...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, even better faculty.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus of OP Jindal Global University is Wi-Fi enabled, with fairly decent speed. The hostels are comfortable, and any infrastructural problems (such as plumbing or electrical issues) are taken care of as soon as they are reported. The hostels are also very clean and hygienic, and the students can call for the staff members to clean the rooms when required via an app. The food served in the mess halls, catered by Sodexo, is nutritious and tasty, and the students also get to pick from 3...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jindal School of Art and Architecture, O.P. Jindal Global University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good in this college. Computer laboratory is available. The hostel facilities are better. Staff members are average. The food served in the mess is good.

paragraphs: The cost of tuition for the B.Arch degree at O.P. Jindal Global University's Jindal School of Design and Architecture is INR 3,00,000 per year. Apart from the tuition, there's an annual hostel charge of INR 3,10,000 and a one-time refundable security deposit. Thus, the total cost of the JSDA B.Arch programme would be INR 15.50 Lacs for dormitory fees and INR 20.00 Lacs for tuition. For the most precise and recent cost information, it is advised to check out the official website or get in touch with the university directly.

The fee structure covers a variety of components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, tuition fee, and others. Besides, students also need to pay a hostel fee for accommodation.

college_info.intro:
Guru Kashi University offers a large diversity of courses to students at its campus. Students can access UG programs, among which the popular courses include BBA, BEd, BVoc, among others. The Bachelor of Arts (BA) GKU course is available to students in a large collection of specializations.
Students can pursue higher education with PG programs like MBA (Agribusiness), MA, MTech, MEd, among others. Students seeking to pursue research and doctorate fields can choose from the various PhD programs at GKU Bathinda.

faqs.answer: A:    Every course at Guru Kashi University has different eligibility criteria for admission purposes. For B.tech the candidate must have done his class 12 from a recognised board. individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.

content.Placements: 70% of students in my course get selected. The highest package is 6.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package ranges from 3-3.5 LPA. Honda and Tech Mahindra are the top companies that visit the college to hire students from my course. 60% of students got internships from my course in the HDFC Bank. The top role offered is a manager.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.

content.Placements: About 50 to 60% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, and the average is 3.50 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Kent, Nestled, etc. About 70 to 80% of the students get internships. Top roles are AI ML, and web development.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are not that enough. Around 2-3% of students got placements. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the minimum is 2 LPA. There are many companies like JU, Prabhat Seeds, etc. In this course, the top roles are to manage the agricultural field, pesticide distribution, safe use, and many banking jobs like assistant manager are there.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college.

content.Placements: It is a great university where many students secure placements after finishing their studies. Last year, many students achieved about 100 out of 30-40. So, it is a nice university you can check out if you want to pursue a degree or master’s in any field.
content.Infrastructure: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed here. The highest package here is 10 LPA, and the lowest package ranges from 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Amazon. Around 80% of students secure internships in companies like Microsoft, Deloitte, and startups.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

admission_overview.college_name: Guru Kashi University Admission 2025: Process, Eligibility, Dates

paragraphs: Guru Kashi University has over 100 courses in 16 domains that are offered at the UG, PG, & PhD levels.
Find below the eligibility and selection criteria:
Guru Kashi University 2025- Admission Process
Find below the detailed process for Guru Kashi University admissions 2025:
1: Guru Kashi University Application Process 2025

Just so you know – the filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Guru Kashi University. However, the application & entrance test fee will be paid online & candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the 2 copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
2: Selection Rounds
Admission to all the PG courses at Guru Kashi University is entrance-based.
3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After completing all the selection rounds, candidates must appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of the Guru Kashi University fee to secure their seats.

headings.text: 2025 Guru Kashi University Admission: Eligibility and others

courses_data.name: Guru Kashi University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Kashi University's BE/BTech programme offers 300 seats across various disciplines like Mechanical, Petroleum, Civil, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering. Eligibility requires a 50% score in CBSE 12th or equivalent exams. With 60 seats allocated to each specialisation, students can pursue their desired field in engineering at Guru Kashi University.

faqs.question: Can I join Guru Kashi University - GKU without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Every course at Guru Kashi University has different eligibility criteria for admission purposes.For B.tech the candidate must have done his class 12 from a recognised board. The university also accepts LEET which is a state-level lateral entry entrance test.For Mtech the candidate should have a minimum of 50% marks in the Bachelor of the same course.For an MBA, the candidate must have completed his graduation from a recognized university.For PhD, the admission is based on the entrance test.For o

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take BTech admission at Guru Kashi University - GKU?
faqs.answer: The procedure to get admission in any course at Guru Kashi University (GTU) is through entrance examinations like CMAT, CAT etc. On the basis of marks attained in these entrance examinations a merit list is created and that would be the deciding factor of whether or not you would be getting a seat in GTU.In order to get admission in B.Tech one should give JEE Mains and advanced examination. Scoring a decent rank will led to your name in the merit list and ultimately an admission in GTU

courses_data.name: Guru Kashi University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Kashi University's MBA/PGDM programme in Agri Business Management for 2025 offers 75 seats. Eligibility requires a 45% score in both graduation and CBSE 12th exams. The programme accepts scores from CAT, MAT, XAT, and CMAT exams.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University - GKU accept CAT for MBA?
faqs.answer: Guru Kashi University is one of the top MBA colleges in India. It is a 2-year full time program. Yes, it accepts CAT ( Common Admission Test) for MBA but it's not compulsory to give thai exam. CAT exam is an entrances exam which is widely accepted in manh colleges but it is not mandatory for all MBA admission. You can also find many other alternatives for CAT like CMAT, GMAT, MAT and XATXAT entrance exam which are also accepted by many colleges.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Guru Kashi University expensive?
faqs.answer: Punjab, India, starts at INR 2 Lacs and can go up to INR 25 Lacs per year.Some say the fees are expensive, with the first and second semesters costing INR 62,580 and the second year costing INR 60,580

faqs.question: When I can apply for Guru Kashi University MBA courses?
faqs.answer: Guru Kashi University is going to open its admission portal for the academic batch 2025. Currently, candidates can raise an inquiry for admission but the application process has not been started yet. Prospective candidates should keep a check on Guru Kashi University MBA admission dates from the official website of the university or can directly reach to university's admission office.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University (GKU) in Talwandi Sabo, Bathinda, offers a 100% fee refund policy for students who withdraw from admission, according to their policy and without any charges. GKU is recognised by the UGC and has been accredited by NAAC with an A+

faqs.question: Can I take direct admissions to BCom courses at Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University offers merit-based admission to BCom. Candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria and apply on the official website of the university. After all the procedures the institute releases its merit list. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit then they have to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

placement_report.college_name: Guru Kashi University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Guru Kashi University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest package offered during Guru Kashi University placements in recent past stood at INR 100 LPA . The top recruiters in recent past included U Mumba , PlanetSpark and TCS

faqs.question: Is Guru Kashi University good for placements?
faqs.answer: Placements are good, approximately 90% of students get placed. Top companies come and recruit the students. It is the top recruiting university. The highest package offered here was 7 LPA and Average package is around 2-3 LPA and good packages are offered. Roles such as marketing are offered in the agriculture course.

faqs.question: Does Guru Kashi University offers internships to MBA students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Kashi University does offer internships to MBA students. There are a number of documents and PdF on the university's official website that include information about the placement cell and internship opportunities given by the university. However, GKU Bathinda does not specify the duration of internships for MBA students.

faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Guru Kashi University good?
faqs.answer: Almost every student at Guru Kashi University (GKU) gets placement in top MNCs. The average package is around INR 3 lakhs, the highest package is around INR 6,50,000 lakhs, and the minimum salary for the students is INR 1,50,000 per annum.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing BCom from Guru Kashi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Guru Kashi University can apply to various government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities in Punjab to do the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department are excellent. It has a 24x7 Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs for different subjects. Classrooms are good. There is a huge library in which more than 500 students can study at one time.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied by the mess food quality, roads, and the college life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Classrooms are also good, and Wi-Fi is available in hostel libraries. The hostel facilities is good, and the mess food quality is good in some hostels, and in some hostels it is bad. The sports tournament is held at our university every year. The canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are more experienced and now there are new facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the course and the college are good as well. The labs and fields are there for better knowledge. Staff is also good but the new staff is just okay not that much good. Hostel looks good but I never lived in a hostel. The food of the hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college.
reviews.review_text: It has many buildings and departments according to different fields, and each department is very well maintained. There are plenty of canteens around the departments for lunch, as well as a library, computer lab, etc. It also has a park.

reviews.review_heading: Best university in Punjab, and all faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The department offers a well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi, best classroom, and a smart library with ample resources. Hostels have decent facilities including clean rooms, attached bathrooms, Wi-Fi, and study space. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical facilities are available. Gym is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but placement percentage is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, and the buildings are superb. You can get free Wi-Fi, advanced labs, and a library here, but the classrooms are average not bad, but not the best. Hostels are good, and the food is also good. I was living in Shivalik Hostel, and that was awesome. Sports ground, medical facilities, and games, everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very good, the faculty is very good, but the placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are two types of hostels, on-campus and off-campus. For off-campus hostels, two-seater and three-seater rooms are available. The campus has Wi-Fi, mess, and canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and Supportive behaviour of the Staffs
reviews.review_text: Hostels are divided into three facilities :- A/C, Cooler, and fan. There are two playgrounds for the students to play. It is fully covered by wifi . Meals are awesome. Wardens are more supportive. There are central library, and many computer labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied because there is no good infrastructure, campus and management.
reviews.review_text:
Hostels are not good not bad, just average. 
But college infrastructure like labs and classrooms is not good, and sittings are also bad.
The main issue in summers is no proper fan working and in labs there is no AC.
In classrooms, there are only 5 fans, and strength of the students is 60.

reviews.review_heading: A glance of GKU. Faculty is very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The labs are equipped with modern instruments but we rarely use them. Classes are normal at any school in the city. There is no air conditioning in classes. Wi-Fi facility only for faculty members. Projectors are there in some classrooms. The boys hostel rooms have attached washrooms, while the girls hostel does not. Average medical facilities are there. Mess food is very bad. Sports and game facilities are the best. Our university will rank 5th in Khelo, India, in 2023.

reviews.review_heading: If you have a budget above INR 4 lakhs for MBA, don't consider GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Classes are equipped with fans but no ACs. Yes, we have projectors in classrooms but no proper board for that. There is one smart lab & computer lab, but again with limited facilities. Yes, the quality of food in the hostel mess is good but rooms are overcrowded with 4 boys in a single room.

reviews.review_heading: Great Faculty and family-like College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course, such as Books, Materials, Records, and Bluebooks for internals, we should pay for. In classrooms, there are Fans and Smart-TVs. The Library offers all facilities. Classrooms are large and spacious. The Hostel facilities are great. They offer more facilities, like food in the Mess. The quality of food in Mess is good. Medical facilities and many facilities. The Infrastructure of the College is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty and facilities offered by the GKU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the GKU available for the MBA was good. The college had a pretty big and beautiful campus. Facilities like Wi-Fi, computers, labs, libraries, canteens, halls, auditoriums, etc. were given to the students. A hostel was available for the students of the college. The facilities offered at the college were above average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Kashi University.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in our classrooms with developed infrastructure. Digital classrooms are available with free Wi-Fi facilities. Many sports facilities are available in our college. The mess available in our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a mind-blowing university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is mind-blowing. Hostel gives a homely feeling home. Food served in the mess is very good. Physical education is good. All the facilities are available in the mess. Doctor is available at the university. Library and computer lab are available.

individual_reviews.title: Very good and well-maintained college.

content.Placements: There are very good students, and the placements are so high. Our students got placed in companies Tata, Honda, etc. Many of our students get placed, and they are working now. It motivates us. They also help us solve our doubts. They are also friendly with us.

content.Faculty: The exam is online based in our course. The students are so good. We help each other. We provide notes to help each other. Teachers are so good.

admission_overview.college_name: DKTE Course Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: D.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: D.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Instituteadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers various courses such as BTech, MBA, etc. Apart from these courses, the institute also offers PhD and Diploma courses. The application process atD.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Instituteis conducted online. The institute also offers scholarships to GATE-qualified students. Read the article to know more aboutD.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institutecourse admission2025.

D.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute admission 2025is completely based on the entrance exam as per the respective courses. The university offers more than 10 courses (including specialisations) in various streams such as Engineering, Design, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Check out the following table for details aboutD.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute course admissions2025:
Particulars
DKTE Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

DKTE course admissionis completely merit-based & entrance exam-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Post-entrance exam, candidates also have to appear for a counselling session. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of theD.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute courses:
MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAH CET/GMAT
GATE/MHTCET MTech
Merit-based

D.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute admissionsare a mix of entrance and merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at D.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute is as follows:
STEP 1: D.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. Candidates looking for a PhD course application from the affiliated university, i.e., Shivaji University, Kolhapur. Candidates looking for a course application shall approach the office of the respective course institute. Submit the form after receiving the Ph.D. registration confirmation letter from Shivaji University, Kolhapur. PhD Research Scholar (RS) shall apply to the Director, DKTE, for admission to the PhD program from Shivaji University, Kolhapur.

For the rest of course application, candidates must apply at the official website of the respective entrance exam official website. For example, in the BTech course, candidates must first apply for JEE Main or MHT-CET. After qualifying for the entrance exam, candidates must register for the counselling session.
STEP 2: Selection

Candidates must register to take part in the Centralised Admission Process (CAP). In CAP, during counselling, students are required to select their preferred colleges and courses. Based on these preferences and the ranks, seats will be allotted to the candidates. Further, the selection criteria for the PhD course are merit-based.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theD.K.T.E. Society's Textile and Engineering Institute feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

reviews.review_text: There is continued internet connectivity. There are separate labs for every new subject, and classrooms are well-maintained. The quality of food available in the hostel is good. It feels like home. The food quality is well maintained in mess, canteen, and mini canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The improper college has no facilities and services.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average but not excellent. College mess and hostels are expensive and have too low facilities, with no Wi-Fi and toilets. Lab and classrooms are not connected to Wi-Fi and the library is under construction so we can't study properly in college so we are busy in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: DKTE college student feedback.
reviews.review_text: My college has facilities, water purifiers are available everywhere on campus. It has the best campus with a good environment. We have well-built lab facilities and well-cleaned classrooms. The library has all the books for every course or subject. The canteen is good, and the food is best.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Review of DKTE: Straightforward and Unbiased.
reviews.review_text: DKTE has well-equipped labs for the Textile Department. The labs have machinery for testing, spinning, weaving, and dyeing. Classrooms are also quite spacious and equipped with projectors and speakers for digital learning. Hostels are only available for girls, and they are inside the campus. Canteen and mess facilities are available, but the food quality is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and good placement support.
reviews.review_text: DKTE Ichalkaranji offers advanced labs, Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, a vast library and modern infrastructure. Hostels provide clean rooms, good food in the mess or canteen, medical aid and excellent sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for textile students.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is average, and there is a library with Wi-Fi. Labs are great. Campus is not very large, but it is decent and has a canteen with a lot of delicious food. There is a sports department that includes a gym, table tennis, and many other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and supportive staff. Active mentors. Exams are taken very strictly.
reviews.review_text: College labs are well-equipped and have fastest internet connections, about 100 mb/s. Classrooms are also well maintained. There is a projector in every classroom. Some have digital screens. Canteen food quality is average, not so good. For sports, there are two gyms. The first is for boys, which is not well-equipped, and the second is for girls, which has advanced equipment.

college_info.intro:
Swami Vivekanand University MP gives UG and PG courses across multiple streams such as Education, Law, Science, Hotel Management, Nursing, etc. The popular programmes at Vivekanand University Sagar are MBA, BSc, and BTech.
Vivekanand University MP has a full-time, 4-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech courses given at the university cover courses in the areas of Mechanical, Civil, Electrical and Electronics, Agriculture, Information Technology, etc. The MBA programme given by the Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Madhya Pradesh is a 2-year programme. It is given in several specialisations, including Fire and Safety Management, Disaster Management, and Hotel Management.
Vivekanand University Sagar MP also gives several programmes in distance learnig mode. Below mentioned are Swami Vivekanand University popular programmes:

review_content.Placements: Enrolling in this private university ensures a secure career with excellent placement opportunities. It is a top-rated university in the Sagar district, and reputable companies like RSPL Limited actively hire talent from this institute. Many local companies also provide internships for students, contributing to a well-rounded experience. The average package ranges from 3–4 LPA, with the highest reaching 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda University is a private University managed by Prakhar Pragya Siksha Prasar Avum Samaj Kalayan Samiti, Madhya Pradesh. The University is UGC approved and is recognised by AICTE and ISO. The university offers several programs across various streams of Arts, Commerce, Science, Designing, Engineering etc.Admissions to Swami Vivekananda University are based on the scores obtained in Entrance exams. MBA and M.Tech admissions are based on the scores in National entrance exams like CAT and GATE; whereas admissions to the undergraduate degrees are based on the merit scores of the candidates in the qualifying exam.The University offers a Bachelor’s programme in Aeronautical Engineering. Admission to the programme is based on the qualifying scores of the candidates in JEE Main followed by a personal interview round. Applications to admissions are available in both Online and Offline modes.The University holds a good placement record; companies like IDEA, INFOSYS, Airtel, Dabur etc. are some of the top recruiters in the placement drive at the campus. The institute also offers scholarships to the poor, needy as well as meritorious students as per the scholarship programmes by the government. Students have to apply for the scholarships at the starting of the academic session with the required documents.
faqs.question: Q: Is Swami Vivekanand University UGC approved?

faqs.answer: The admissions for Swami Vivekanand University have been going on, but the application form date has passed.The privately owned Swami Vivekananda University, popularly known as SVU, was established in 2019. Swami Vivekananda University is situated in Barrackpore, West Bengal. Public transit connects it to the main city extremely well. The university offers top-notch instruction in a range of subject areas.

overview_faqs.question: Is Swami Vivekanand University UGC approved?
overview_faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda University is a private University managed by Prakhar Pragya Siksha Prasar Avum Samaj Kalayan Samiti, Madhya Pradesh. The University is UGC approved and is recognised by AICTE and ISO. The university offers several programs across various streams of Arts, Commerce, Science, Designing, Engineering etc.Admissions to Swami Vivekananda University are based on the scores obtained in Entrance exams. MBA and M.Tech admissions are based on the scores in National entrance exams like CAT and GATE; whereas admissions to the undergraduate degrees are based on the merit scores of the candidates in the qualifying exam.The University offers a Bachelor’s programme in Aeronautical Engineering. Admission to the programme is based on the qualifying scores of the candidates in JEE Main followed by a personal interview round. Applications to admissions are available in both Online and Offline modes.The University holds a good placement record; companies like IDEA, INFOSYS, Airtel, Dabur e

review_summary.college_name: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college with excellent faculty.

content.Placements: No placement and no company ever visit for my course. The students have to do their internship by themselves, and no support is provided by the college. In course, the internship can be done with own money. I have done my internship from TTC Hisar with the amount of 10,000 rupees.
content.Infrastructure: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement, good facilities and really good infrastructure .

content.Placements: Only 2 or 3 students from the whole batch were placed, with not-so-handsome packages, and no big giants' companies came to recruit the students. Internships are available if you want to arrange them on your own in pharmaceutical industries and hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The college is spread over approximately 65 acres with highly facilitated infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained on the campus. The hostel facilities are also well maintained, with good food available in the mess. Additionally, sports and games are conducted every year.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SVN University Sagar MBA Review.

content.Placements: Enrolling in this private university ensures a secure career with excellent placement opportunities. It is a top-rated university in the Sagar district, and reputable companies like RSPL Limited actively hire talent from this institute. Many local companies also provide internships for students, contributing to a well-rounded experience. The average package ranges from 3–4 LPA, with the highest reaching 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SVN has a nice campus and placement service.

content.Placements: SVN is the only private university in Sagar. If you're looking to take admission at this institution, that's good for your career. They have a good network with companies that hire many students from here. P&G's highest salary offer for an assistant manager role is over 7.64 lacs per year.
content.Infrastructure: It is a modern-type institution with the best facilities and a large campus for all course students. Classrooms are highly facilitated and well designed. Wi-fi services are open to everyone around campus. The canteen is close to the institute, and the food is excellent. Sports activities are held every weekend.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Swami Vivekanand Vishwavidyalaya review.

content.Placements: SVN is the only private university in Sagar City. They are a reputed institute. All local industries come to visit and hire. Most business sector companies hire from these; the highest salary is 7 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA at the university. The top role offered is manager.
content.Infrastructure: This university has a modern, advanced-designed infrastructure, well-furnished classrooms, and an A.C. cabin for officials only, a fully-stocked library, and labs for other practical works. Here is a hostel outside of the city with a nice mess and good food quality; the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic.

admission_overview.title: Swami Vivekanand University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Swami Vivekanand University admissions are done on both merit and entrance basis as per the course. For online process, apply through the offcial website. The university offers various UG, PG, Diploma and certificate level courses. These courses are offered across various fields Science, Pharmacy, Education, Law, Computer Applications, etc. Also known as SVN University Sagar, the university is located in Madhya Pradesh. Read the following article to learn all about the admission procedure, courses, and admission criteria of Swami Vivekanand University.

eligibility_selection.title: Swami Vivekanand University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Swami Vivekanand University course admission is subject to the fulfilment of preset admission criteria. Students wishing to enrol into the university need to make sure that they meet both the minimum educational qualifications and the selection criteria to get a seat. Admissions are primarily merit-based. The university may accept valid scores obtained in national or state-level entrance examinations. Further, students may have to participate in state-level counselling.

paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand University's admission processinvolves application, selection, counselling (if applicable) and admission confirmation. Students need to satisfy the admission criteria to get admission into the university. The application process of the university commences online. Eligible students interested in applying can follow the s explained below to complete the admission process of Swami Vivekanand University.
Application and Registration
Log on to the official website and apply online by filling out the basic details.
Shortlisting Process

Students are mainly selected on a merit basis. However SVU Sagar may also consider entrance exam scores depending on the programme. Students need to provide scores obtained in the last qualifying examination. Exams such as CAT/ MAT can be taken into consideration for MBA admission. For certain courses students may have to participate in Gujarat counselling for seat allotment.
Merit List and Admission Confirmation
Once a seat is offered students need to report for document verification. After that paythe feesfor seat confirmation.

The total tuition fees for the university's courses can include components like tuition fees, library fees, and more. Some of the SVN University fees are charged only once during the time of admissions, while the remaining are to be paid as per the university's guidelines. faqs.answer: The admissions for Swami Vivekanand University have been going on, but the application form date has passed.The privately owned Swami Vivekananda University, popularly known as SVU, was established in 2019. Swami Vivekananda University is situated in Barrackpore, West Bengal. Public transit connects it to the main city extremely well. placement_data.title: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand University placement brochure or report has not been released. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the average package in recent placements ranged between INR 4 LPA and INR 7 LPA . Every year around 70% of the batch gets successfully placed . Furthermore, the highest package offered in recent drives was INR 8 LPA . PhonePe, Adani Group, and Nike, among others were some of the leading companies that participated in Swami Vivekanand University placements over the past few years.

faqs.question: How are B.Tech placements at SVC - Swami Vivekanand University?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanand University (SVU) offers B.Tech placements with good opportunities for students. The university has a placement cell that facilitates the placement process. Many companies visit the university every year for placements. The university provides internships for students after the 2nd semester. The average salary package for B.Tech students is 3.5 Lacs per annum.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing a BA at Swami Vivekanand University?
faqs.answer: Pursuing a BA at Swami Vivekanand University can lead to varied career prospects depending on the specialisations chosen by the candidates. The university provides various specialisations and subject combinations under its BA course. Generally, a BA graduate can build a career management, media, tourism, hospitality, etc. They are also eligible to appear for competitve exams leading to government jobs. Graduates planning for higher education can go for courses like MA, MBA , etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Academic Facilities: Well-equipped classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and computer centers to support academic learning and research activities.
Hostel Accommodation: On-campus hostel facilities for students, especially those coming from different cities or states.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with excellent faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement, good facilities and really good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The college is spread over approximately 65 acres with highly facilitated infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained on the campus. The hostel facilities are also well maintained, with good food available in the mess. Additionally, sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: SVN University Sagar MBA Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

reviews.review_heading: SVN has a nice campus and placement service.
reviews.review_text: It is a modern-type institution with the best facilities and a large campus for all course students. Classrooms are highly facilitated and well designed. Wi-fi services are open to everyone around campus. The canteen is close to the institute, and the food is excellent. Sports activities are held every weekend.

reviews.review_heading: Swami Vivekanand Vishwavidyalaya review.
reviews.review_text: This university has a modern, advanced-designed infrastructure, well-furnished classrooms, and an A.C. cabin for officials only, a fully-stocked library, and labs for other practical works. Here is a hostel outside of the city with a nice mess and good food quality; the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is large with modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides modern infrastructure. The campus is well-designed. We have a library, a canteen, high technology classrooms, digital screens, Wi-Fi, etc. The hostel is good. It is near our college. It provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: SVN SAGAR campus life experience.
reviews.review_text: SVN provides a better experience on campus. The campus grounds are large and include a sports activity facility. The classroom is fully clean and equipped with an air conditioning facility. The hostel capacity at SVN is a maximum of 200 students. In a hostel, there is a bed, a fan in the rooms, 24*7 electricity, and no shortage of places in the hostel or compound. So the overall average development in the SVN Institute that students expect is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel provides no such facility. It provides ground for playing, and teachers were helpful. The classrooms were fine, and the library was also good. The food quality was not better. It also provides medical facilities. Sports and tournaments were held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and I'm very much satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are quite good and helpful for students. Faculty members are willing to offer help. The hostels are average if we compare them to some private colleges, but are above average if compared to the college of the same city. A library facility is provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities. It provides good practice of field & practical knowledge
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the University is very good. Classrooms and labs are very clean. Large hall for programme, playground. For agriculture course, field practice is also available. Wi-fi facility also available in university. But currently, there is no hostel facility for students. Student can live in nearby colonies on rent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is shaping future engineers.
reviews.review_text: Swami Vivekananda university is big and awesome. It has the perfect environment and atmosphere which suits the college or university. It has huge labs for the different and separate sections of education. The university has an attractive look at the front and also at the intermediate, there is the big and large playground in the front of the university. Mainly, the university is located on a hill.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, quality of education, discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It is situated in a big area. The labs are also there, and they also take us to the other places for the practicals. The classroom is fully air-conditioned, and the medical and the library facilites are also there. They give a chance to attend different seminars, and we also get the chances to interact with the companies.

reviews.review_heading: Placement record is not good but teachers are very helpful
reviews.review_text: Labs, the classroom, the library and sports facilities are good. The canteen is very bad. There is no Wi-Fi when I am in the college. The quality of classrooms and labs is good. Also, there are good lab instruments. Lab attendants give us proper knowledge about the experiment. Hostel rooms are good. I didn't face any infrastructure-related issues in my college time. Medical facilities are good as well.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I find the work and facilities at my college to be excellent.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very comfortable and provides good performance, although I don't stay in the hostel. However, the hostel is in very good condition, feels comfortable, and the bedrooms are awesome. The study materials are great, and the owner is an excellent worker. I hope the hostel maintains very good conditions, and the kitchen offers sweet food, served hot.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is not any hostel or Wi-Fi facility in the college, as it is not even required because all the students are from the local city. But yes, if we talk about sports and games, then there is huge scope; they support all the curricular activities and once a year, a sports meet is also conducted for students.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at NIMS University Jaipur are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. NIMS Jaipur courses strive to enhance students' learning experience in order to prepare them for the industry.
These courses are approved by AICTE and are offered to students in full-time mode. course_faqs.question: What is the fees for NIMS University BPharma?
course_faqs.answer: NIMS University BPharm fees is INR 4.6 lakh. Students can pay the fees through the accepted payment gateway. Students have to pay the fees within the given time. To know more, students can contact the university.

course_faqs.question: How can I apply for NIMS BPharm scholarship?
course_faqs.answer: Candidates who meet the scholarship criteria can apply in online mode. NIMS BPharm scholarship form is available on the official website. The important documents also have to be provided for verification.

course_faqs.question: What is the NIMS special scholarship package for BPharm students opting for hostel?
course_faqs.answer: Candidates who opt for hostel get a special fee discount. NIMS BPharm fee for students opting for hostel is INR 2.75 lakh, per year. The bifurcation is that the tuition fee is INR 1.15 Lacs and INR 1.6 Lacs is the hostel fee. This fee data is as per the official website.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for various courses at NIMS University?
overview_faqs.answer: NIMS University Jaipur total fee is include multiple components such as hostel fees, tuition fees, security deposits, and more. It is within the rights of the university to revise the fee structure. Below are NIMS University courses and fees:CoursesTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 1.5 - 8 lakhMScINR 70,000- 3 lakhMBAINR 3 Lacs - 6 lakhBScINR 60,000- 7 lakh

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA course at NIMS University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of MBA at NIMS University is INR 4 lakh. This is the tuition fee for two years. Candidates are required to pay the course fee for the first year after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission.

overview_faqs.question: What steps are to be followed for paying NIMS University Jaipur fee?
overview_faqs.answer: The university offers online option to pay any semester, application and others fees. To pay the fee candidates are required to visit the official website of the university. Given below are the steps to pay application fee at NIMS University Jaipur:Step 1: Visit the official website of NIMS University Rajasthan.Step 2: Click on Pay Fee option on the Home page.Step 3: The link redirect candidates to other page.Step 4: To pay the fee candidates required to select their respective colleges.Step 5: Enter the Student ID and click on Validate and Pay the fee.

overview_faqs.question: Are NIMS University Jaipur scholarships applicable on the total fee?
overview_faqs.answer: No, the NIMS University scholarships are applicable to the first-year tuition fees only. Further, candidates pursuing PhD, Diploma in Paramedical, Nursing, Pharmacy, and Architecture programmes are not eligible for any scholarship offered by the University.

review_summary.college_name: NIMS Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good, and the staff is very helpful.

content.Placements: Our college was a government university. It provided good placement packages at different companies, such as TCS, Tech Mahindra, JSW, and Capgemini. Packages range from 5 to 15 LPA. The college provided internships to all students every semester.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided good infrastructure for classrooms, labs, and the library. High-speed Wi-Fi was available. Different labs were provided by different departments, such as the computer lab, chemistry lab, and biology lab. A well-stocked library was also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering (Electric Vehicle Technology) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you take admission, you will definitely find it worth it.

content.Placements: Recently, 85 percent of students in my course get placements. The highest package is 42 LPA. The lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average is 5–6 LPA. The placement cell of our institute is very active and supportive. It provides students with training, workshops, and mock interviews to enhance employability skills. Reputed companies from various sectors visit the campus every year. They offer good packages and career opportunities. Many students are successfully placed in top organizations, reflecting the strong industry-academia connection.

The library offers a wide range of books and e-resources. The hostel has clean rooms, 24/7 water and electricity supply. Along with common study areas, hygienic mess facilities, and proper security. It ensures a comfortable and safe environment for students.

admission_overview.college_name: NIMS Jaipur Course Admissions 2026 (Open): Application, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: NIMS University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: NIMS University admissions are based on both academic merit in the qualifying exam and entrance exam performance. The admission criteria for each course is different. For admission to most of its undergraduate and postgraduate courses, NIMS University conducts in-house entrance test - NIMSEE. Those with valid scores obtained in national-level exams, such as JEE Main (for BTech), GATE (for MTech) and NEET, NEET SS (for medical courses) may apply directly for the desired NIMS University Jaipur programme. The university offers over 450 courses through its 20+ affiliated colleges in the fields of Nursing, Engineering & Technology, Management & Commerce, Medical and Allied Sciences, Humanities & Social Sciences, Aviation, and more. Read below to know about detailed admission process and eligibility for NIMS University Jaipur courses.

eligibility_selection.title: NIMS University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: NIMS University course admissions are subject to the fulfilment of preset admission criteria. The university accepts students based on either academic merit or entrance exam scores as per the admission guideline of each course. Candidates must also meet minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The university may call students for Personal Interview (PI) round for MBA admission. Students are required to pass Class 12 with relevant subjects for UG courses. Similarly, for PG admissions, candidates need to complete graduation. The university also accepts various national and state-level entrance exams in addition to conducting its own entrance exam (NIMSEE) to shortlist its students. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular NIMS University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) from a recognised board or Those who have completed 3-year diploma with a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% aggregate for reserved category) subject to vacancies in the first year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted
Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category)
Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised university
Bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
Class 12 with PCB or Biology as an additional subject with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for PwD and 40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC)**
Class 12 with PCB & English with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PBC)
Bachelor's degree in relevant field from a recognised university
BSc or equivalent degree with a minimum aggregate of 50% - 55% from a recognised university
Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board

faqs.answer: NIMS University eligibility require students to complete the qualifying examination with specified marks. See below a general eligibility for various NIMS University courses:NIMS University UG eligibility is to pass Class 12 in relevant stream from a recognised boardNIMS University PG eligibility is to complete Bachelor's degree in relevant field from a recognised university
faqs.question: Who is eligible for NIMS University admission?

faqs.answer: Yes, aspirants who have passed Class 12 with PCB & English with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PBC) are eligible to apply for NIMS University Jaipur BDS programme. Candidates must also be a minimum of 17 years old as on Dec 31 of the admission year and a maximum of 25 years to apply for the course.
faqs.question: Can I get admission at NIMS University for BDS after Class 12?

faqs.answer: The university offers over 450 courses at UG, PG and PhD levels through 24 affiliated colleges. paragraphs: NIMS University admissionsare offered to eligible students who clear the selection rounds and duly submit all the documents before the last date. The admissions are currently open. Interested students can visit the official website of the university to apply online. The university offers admission to candidates based on merit of last qualifying exam or entrance exam scores depending on the programme. Follow the steps below to complete NIMS University Jaipur:
1 - NIMS University Jaipur Application Process
The mode of application is online. Apply for preferred course at UG and PG level. Fill the application form on the university's official website and submit it with the application fee and documents.
2 - Selection
At NIMS University Jaipur, students are selected based on either of the following criteria:

Merit-based admission: For multiple UG courses, such as BBA, BCA, BPT Class 12 marks are the only selection criteria. Similarly, for PG courses including MPharma, MPhil, MPEd, the university considers academic scores secured in Bachelor's degree.

Entrance-based admission: The university accepts entrance exam scores such as NEET, GATE, JET Agriculture, etc are accepted various courses such as MBBS, MTech, BTech respectively. Students can also opt to appear for the NIMSEE if they don't have scores of the above-mentioned exams.
3 - Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theNIMS University Jaipur cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for verification of documents and pay theNIMS University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Is BPharm available at NIMS University?
faqs.answer: NIMS University offers BPharm for a duration of four-year divided into eight semesters. faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for BPharm course at NIMS University?
faqs.answer: Admission to BPharm course is based on NIMSEE. faqs.question: Is NIMS University, Jaipur a good university?
