placement_report.college_name: NIMS Jaipur Placements 2026: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: NIMS University Jaipur Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: NIMS University Jaipur placements held recently recorded a highest package (overseas) of INR 120 LPA .The highest domestic package offered was INR 60 LPA . More than 500 companies took part during the placement drive.

The highest and average package offered to Engineering students during NIMS University Jaipur placements 2025 were INR 35 LPA and INR 5.5 LPA respectively. While the highest and average package offered to the Business students of the batch 2025 were INR 21 LPA and INR 6.8 LPA, respectively. The School of Law students got the highest package of INR 10.5 LPA , whereas the average package offered was INR 6.8 LPA.

71 recruiters participated during NIMS University Jaipur placements for the School of Engineering and presented 215 job offers to the students of the batch 2025. Similarly, 42 recruiters participated for the School of Business placements and presented 153 job offers to the students of the batch 2025. The students of the School of Law secured 65 job offers , Physiotherapy students secured 78 , Humanities students received 53 job offers , and Paramedical students received 81 job offers during the 2025 placements at NIMS University Jaipur.

Some of the top recruiters who visited at NIMS University Jaipur in 2025 include TCS, Infosys, Deloitte, Capegemini, Samsung, Adani, Wipro, Tata, HP, HCL, L&T, Gammon, Genisis, Amazon, Centum, Bajaj Hero, Bosch , KPMG , etc.
Earlier, during the placement drive 2024 , highest international and domestic package offered was INR 1.2 Crore per annum and INR 60 LPA .

Check out the school-wise key highlights of NIMS University Jaipur placements for the Class of 2025 in the table below: School Average Package (2025) Highest Package (2025) Total Recruiter (2025) Total Offers (2025) Engineering INR 5.5 LPA INR 35 LPA 71 215 Business INR 6.8 LPA INR 21 LPA 42 153 Law INR 5.8 LPA INR 10.5 LPA 27 65 Physiotherapy INR 4.8 LPA INR 8.4 LPA 28 78 Humanities INR 3.6 LPA INR 10.8 LPA 25 53 Paramedical INR 3.6 LPA INR 7.2 LPA 17 81 Aviation INR 4.8 LPA INR 10.8 LPA 12 23 Tourism INR 4.8 LPA INR 7.2 LPA 8 29 Pharmacy INR 4.2 LPA INR 7.2 LPA 17 72 Nursing INR 3.6 LPA INR 4.8 LPA 11 47

faqs.question: How are placements at NIMS University?
faqs.answer: According to the official website, the the highest package of INR 12.02 LPA was offered during NIMS University MBA placement. According to the official website, the college rolls out more than 1,200 placement offers each year and as of now, more than 15,000 students have been placed across Accenture, EY, IBM, TCS and Wipro, among various other organisations. Click here to know more about NIMS University placements .

description: NIMS University Jaipur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

NIMS University NEET UG Cutoff 2025 is not available as of yet. Until then, students can review the NIMS University NEET UG Cutoff 2024 from the table below. The University accepts the NEET UG cutoff ranks for admission to Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) and Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) programmes. More details can be found in the table below:

NIMS University Jaipur accepts NEET UG rank for admission to the MBBS and BDS courses. In 2024, the NEET UG last round closing rank for admission to the MBBS course is 1251417 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the Home State quota, the last round closing rank stood at 1389265 for the same course. For other courses, use the filters provided below:

NIMS University accepts NEET UG scores, followed by NEET UG Counselling process for admission to the MBBS and BDS course. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out some of the important dates related to NEET UG for NIMS University MBBS admission:

Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's NEET UG Counselling Rounds for the NIMS University MBBS and BDS course for category students under the All India and Home State quota.

NIMS University NEET SS Cutoff 2025 will be available on this page soon. Until then, students can review the NIMS University NEET SS Cutoff 2024. The University accepts the NEET SS entrance exam, followed by its counselling process for admission to the DM and MCh courses.

In 2024, the last round cutoff rank concluded between 189 and 6825 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. The most competitive course for admission was with a lowest cutoff rank of . The lower

NIMS University cutoff ranks for 2024 and 2023 are available in the table below for multiple courses, specialisations and categories. In 2024, the cutoff ranks vary from 189 and 6825 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Under the DM courses, the most challenging specialisation for admission was Neonatology, followed by Interventional Radiology, with the last round closing ranks of 189 and 275, respectively. For more cutoff-related information, use the filters below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates for admission to NIMS University Jaipur MCh and DM courses. Students who want admission to this university should keep track of these important dates as to not miss out on any deadline.
Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated cutoff list for NEET SS for 2024 and 2023 to understand the previous years' cutoff trends.

NMIS University Jaipur accepts the NEET UG entrance scores for admission to the MBBS and BDS courses at the UG level. Candidates with a valid NEET UG rank are eligible to appear in the Rajasthan NEET counselling for final seat allotment. NMIS University Rajasthan NEET cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds up to Round 4, wherein the closing rank for BDS admission stood at 609683 in the General AI category.

For PG courses admission, such as MD, MS, and MDS, NEET PG is the accepted exam, followed by the Rajasthan NEET counselling. NIMS University Rajasthan NEET PG Cutoff 2025 is not available yet; in the meantime, candidates can check out the previous years' cutoff details to understand the cutoff trends.
The Rajasthan NEET PG Cutoff 2022 ranged from 40 in the first round closing ranks to 4393 in the last round closing ranks. More details are mentioned in the table below:

highlights.description: NIMS University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #79 in the Pharmacy category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around NIMS University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Rajasthan In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, NIMS University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the NIMS University's rankings in 'University' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, NIMS University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

qs_world.description:
NIMS University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankingss for NIMS University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel.description: The hostels have their own housekeeping staff, with an uninterrupted supply of regular water, purified drinking water, and electricity. They have round-the-clock security, with a team of wardens (both male and female) and the proctor staying within the hostel premise.
facilities: Sports complex and indoor-outdoor game facilities
In campus bank facilities, ATMs, hospital, post office, and laundry services
Separate hostels for boys and girls
More than three multi-cuisine restaurants and other three food and beverage outlets
Separate hostel facilities for girls and boys
In campus shopping mall, 24*7 store, salon, and a stationary shop
Modern lab equipped with all required machinery and tools

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball

cafeteria.description: Nims University has a central cafeteria, with ample indoors and outdoors seating space. Most of the day, the cafeteria is chock-a-block with patrons looking to grab a delicious snack, a refreshing cup of coffee or a cold drink to beat the heat. In the late evenings, the cafeteria transforms into a restaurant, acting as an alternate eating place for those desiring a change from the regular mess/home food. A variety of sumptuous multi-cuisine dinner items are served, all prepared in the “Vegetarian Snacks”. You will find several groups of students and staff engaged in deep conversation, enjoying a tasty, affordable meal under the clear night sky.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good, and the staff is very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided good infrastructure for classrooms, labs, and the library. High-speed Wi-Fi was available. Different labs were provided by different departments, such as the computer lab, chemistry lab, and biology lab. A well-stocked library was also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NIMS Institute of Medical and Allied Sciences, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is very helpful for students.
reviews.review_text: In our course, facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are available. The hostel is fully furnished. The mess food is very bad, and we do not get the food at the right time. The food is not good for our health.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by NIMS College of Paramedical Technology, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: NIMS University B.Sc. OTT (review).
reviews.review_text: The university had excellent facilities, including well-equipped laboratories, a good library, and various blocks for different departments. The campus was not good, and Wi-Fi access was limited. We can play different types of sports on campus whenever we want.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NIMS College of Physiotherapy and Occupational Therapy, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in the universe.
reviews.review_text: In the courses department and also Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are also fully furnished. The facilities in the hostel are good. The food in the mess is very bad, we do not get the food at the right time, and it is not accurate in taste. The food is very bad and not tasty and your hygiene will be disrupted for your health.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by NIMS Institute of Engineering and Technology, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 5 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: If you take admission, you will definitely find it worth it.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure for both academics and hostel life. Classrooms are spacious. It includes smart boards and Wi-Fi. The library offers a wide range of books and e-resources. The hostel has clean rooms, 24/7 water and electricity supply. Along with common study areas, hygienic mess facilities, and proper security. It ensures a comfortable and safe environment for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NIMS Nursing College, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 4 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of NIMS Nursing College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure provided by the course department, with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library, are fully furnished. The facilities in the hostel are poor, and the mess food is very bad, you won't get the food on time or tasty.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NIMS Nursing College, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 29 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Why you should choose NIMS.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. All the rooms are fully air-conditioned and furnished with the facilities of the hostel, which are good. The RO water cooler is also there, and the canteen, medical facilities, and sports games are all available too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by NIMS Institute of Pharmacy, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 24 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for enjoy your course.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was excellent. There were canteens, a big hospital, and labs were clean and equipped with all necessary instruments.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is full like a cyber hub and classrooms are fully clean and furnished. In each classroom, there are projectors and AC. There is 24x7 Wi-Fi in the college. The hostel is like a 3-star hotel. The food quality is the best. There are separate sections of a sports complex.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by National Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 23 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: I would like to start with these college facilities. The infrastructure of this college is the best. Classrooms are equipped with AC in summer and are huge to prevent suffocation. Hostel life is something everyone misses after graduation, same at NIMS University. Hostels are very good in infrastructure. Two types of rooms are there AC and Non-AC. Food in mess is good enough.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NIMS Institute of Medical and Allied Sciences, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 19 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Management understand students basic needs.
reviews.review_text: We have 3 beds, AC, theater, lift, and hostel mess. The meal quality is good sometimes and bad sometimes. At NIMS University there are a lot of options you can choose from hostels to PG rooms. Only NIMS students can take admitted in hostel. Fee is Rs. 1,50,000 per year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NIMS Institute of Medical and Allied Sciences, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 19 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Fest and cultural events occurs often.
reviews.review_text: Laundry, mess, geyser, filtered water, and maid for daily cleaning are provided. Mess menu changes every month maid, clean daily room and washrooms, electricity, and water come 24/7. Wooden work and shelf are properly done. Chair, table, shelf, cupboard, bed, and matress are provided. Hostel fees are Rs. 80,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, its excellent infrastructure, 24/7 open campus, and necessary facilities
reviews.review_text: 24/7 open campus, open library, AC libraries, free Wi-Fi in rooms, AC classrooms, smart classes. good hostel mess and food, new hostel rooms with all proper facilities, restaurants and cafes, multiple sports facilities, shops, and shopping malls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by NIMS Institute of Engineering and Technology, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 17 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: NIMS University, Jaipur 2013 honest review on infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: The course has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and a good library with books and digital resources. Hostels are clean and secure with shared rooms. The mess provides tasty food with good variety. The canteen offers snacks and refreshments. Medical facilities are available on campus with 24x7 emergency support. For sports, there are grounds and courts for cricket, football, badminton, and a gym for fitness.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Nims Institute of Business Studies, NIMS UniversityReviewed on 12 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members are here. They prepare us for interviews and internships.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are best here as they provide fully AC and furnished rooms to students. It provides 3 sharing rooms with 3 beds, 3 study tables, and 3 separate almirahs for students. It also provides Wi-Fi and a cold water filter for students. The hostel also contains a mess in which food is served to the students of the best quality.

college_info.college_name: NIMS Jaipur Scholarship Details

paragraphs: NIMS Jaipur scholarships are provided to help students who are brilliant in academics and are not supported by the means to pursue education. Till now, over 50,000 meritorious students have been awarded NIMS University scholarships. The university offers a limited number of merit and need-based scholarships offered on a first-come-first-serve basis.

description: KLS Gogte Institute of Technology, Belagavi cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

KLS Gogte Institute of Technology, Belagavi Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 13319 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 17802 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at KLS Gogte Institute of Technology, Belagavi. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 13319 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 3114, while in 2023, it was 3548.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

KLS Gogte Institute of Technology, Belagavi accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) has the lowest cutoff rank of 15720 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 18298, in the General All India quota.

According to the KLS Gogte Institute of Technology, Belagavi B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Civil Engineering stood at 7406 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 77607. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college with the best teaching faculty and placement offices.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the hostel and college are amazing. There is a 24/7 library and good Wi-Fi coverage both in the hostel and the college. The food served in the hostel mess and canteen is also better. There is a sports club where students can play any sport they want with the permission of the staff.

reviews.review_heading: KLS Gogte Institute of Technology
reviews.review_text: We have excellent Wi-Fi and lab facilities. Even classes and library management are done very well. Hostel facilities are good. Teachers are  helpful and friendly with the students, which makes it easy for us to approach them and clear our doubts regarding the curriculum.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KLS GIT Belgaum.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for this course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and best teaching. All facilities are very good and also infrastructure is also the best. Quality of facilities available in the hostel is also good. Quality of food available in mess and canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: College has decent infrastructure and curriculum they make you industry-ready but in previous years.
reviews.review_text: College has small infrastructure and a small campus but basic things are available like dedicated labs for every department and IT building. If we talk about hostels, it is affordable and decent. Many options are there like 3 sharing, 2 sharing, and 1 sharing with balcony rooms are provided hostels are neat and clean. 24/7 Wi-Fi is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are there.
reviews.review_text: Our college is good and maintained clean. All the classrooms and labs are well-developed. They will provide good Wi-Fi facilities. They provide 24/7 library in the hostel. The facilities are good and well-maintained. Mess is also good. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements and great labs.
reviews.review_text: The Aeronautical Engineering department generally has well-equipped labs, advanced simulation software, dedicated classrooms and strong Wi-Fi connectivity. Hostels offer decent accommodation with basic medical facilities, good sports infrastructure and nutritious mess food.

reviews.review_heading: This campus is full of stress-free charging stations for electric vehicles.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers both boys’ and girls’ hostels but unfortunately they are currently messy. However our college provides free gym facilities and the quality of the hostel is good. There is free Wi-Fi throughout the campus, which can be accessed through Sophos. Overall, it’s a fantastic college.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review of GIT college and hostel!
reviews.review_text: You will get Wi-Fi and RO water facilities on all floors of the boys' hostel and college. The classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors, and each class has conditioned labs. Hostel rooms are shared by three students and are furnished with a bed, a table, and a chair. Each room also has a large locker.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the infrastructure is good, and there is a wide campus area with an.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good and has Wi-Fi connectivity all over the hostel and cameras all over the hostel, but the worst part is the mess; the food is hygienically prepared and has no taste at all; moreover, the dishes are not washed properly either.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college with a great placement record and good reputation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like WI-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all very well maintained; the library is huge and students get free books. In the library, there are also computer sensors, a reading room and an e-book centre. Hostel facilities also have good filters set up. It has its own canteen. There are many sports activities there; it has its own football field, basketball court and indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory facilities are available for  the students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for this course was good enough. College management was giving all types of facilities to students. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, classrooms etc. At our college. College was also giving hostel facility to the students. Sports facilities were available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Never ending memories are made here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really well and there is a Wi-Fi facility in both the college and hostel, and classrooms are clean every time. The hostel mess provides the best food, which is nutritious and we have a play ground that helps everyone play games at once.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Belgaum for placements and skill oriented learning.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is good. There is a main building for regular classes, CSE, and ISE Aeronautics and mechanical departments are built individually. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The library has all the necessary academic and non-academic books. There are new hostel rooms built recently with a yearly budget of around 33000 rupees. Hostel mess food is average. Sports facilities are available all the time. There is a field on the back side of campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Belgaum, Karnataka .
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure are too good and Wi-Fi facilities are available for all the courses. We have different labs for different classes and the library is too clean and online reading is also available.
Classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of the food is also good and a Wi-Fi facility is also available. Medical facilities, like ambulance clinics, are also available. They balance both sports games and studies.

reviews.review_heading: The information about my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are a little bit small. There is proper availability of Wi-Fi connections. The labs are very clean, and the labs have modern equipment. There are lots of books in our college library, and our library has research papers. The food provided in the hostel is not so good.

paragraphs: Yes, KLS Gogte Institute of Technology Belagavi does refund fees, but the institute has particular regulations. Refund rules are typically based on the course, other institutional guidelines, and the date of withdrawal. It is preferable to refer to the institute's official refund policy or get in touch with the admissions office directly for more information if you want to know the precise terms for fee refunds.

The total tuition fee for the two-year Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme at KLS Gogte Institute of Technology in Belagavi is INR 116,940. Admission is based on a minimum graduation score of 50% and accepts the KMAT exam. The programme has 120 seats.

The application fee for the Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) programme at KLS Gogte Institute of Technology in Belagavi is not specified, but the total tuition fee for the course is INR 4,82,870. To be eligible for admission to the B.Arch. program, applicants must have scored at least 50% in 12th grade. The programme offers admission to 80 students.

There's no Application fees for applying in the M.Tech course at KLS Gogte Institute of technology. The students can apply online through the institute's website and the final admission is based on the total merit score achieved by the individual.

overview_faqs.answer: Good thing about this college -Excellent faculty including highly skilled and seasoned instructors. Instructors are helpful. A calm study space that prioritizes order and discipline.Good lab spaces for hands-on learning and group projects.Frequent workshops, seminars, and guest lectures are planned. Beneficial exposure for students, Vibrant campus life that includes a wide range of extracurricular, sports, and cultural events. Reasonable tuition in contrast to many other universities. There are also numerous scholarships available.A good choice for local students seeking Science instruction in the Trichy area.Negative side-Certain departments require improvements to their infrastructure and facilities.Research and preparation for competitive tests receive less attention.Absence of recruiters from major brands seeking positions. Average pay scales are modest.There is hardly much research production or publishing from the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Sociology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the campus life and experience.

content.Placements: 20% were placed, and 40% got internships. The top recruiting companies were Leaf, Mitrainikethan, Rajagiri Outreach, and Goonj. There was no highest or lowest package offered in the course as it was a merit seat. Top roles included research roles, research assistants, field investigators, social work, and teaching in the field.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available, the library was good, and classrooms were well-established and equipped with projectors. LAN connections facilitated an interactive learning environment. The fully automated central library was available. The hostel provided spacious and well-ventilated accommodations for 320 students. A modern auditorium equipped with the latest technology. The food quality standards of the hostel were okayish, and the medical facilities were good.

individual_reviews.title: The best college to join. Absolutely satisfied with our placement.

paragraphs: Vimala College admission 2025ismerit-basedfor the majority of the programmes. Few courses require an entrance exam score. The college offers 17 UG courses inB.A., BSc & BComand 16 PG courses inMA, MSW, MComand MSc. Selection for these courses is done based onmeritin the qualifying examination followed by a Personal Interview. Candidates can apply both online and offline. The counselling is done at the university level.

Vimala College, Thrissur was established in the year 1967 and is an esteemed Christian educational institute that is affiliated to the University of Calicut. The college is managed by CMC which is Congregation of Mother of Carmel. The admission process for 2025 is currently awaited application process is expected to go live soon.

Affiliated withCalicut University,Vimala College is an autonomous institute and is open tofemale candidatesonly. The college delivers its courses throughmore than 20 academicdepartments specialised in various fields such asChemistry,Economics,Social Work, andFood Processing. courses_data.name: Vimala College BA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Vimala College Thrissur admission 2025 for the BA course is expected to start soon. The admissions of candidates in the BA course are done through a merit-based system. BA Functional English, BA Sociology, and BA Malayalam Language and Literature are some of the specialisations offered by Vimala College for the BA course. Candidates interested in applying for the BA course at Vimala College Thrissur must meet the eligibility criteria of the specialisation they wish to apply for. Candidates must have class 12 from a board recognised by the college for admission to this college.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in the BA course at Vimala College Thrissur with 50% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, Candidates are eligible for admission in the BA course at Vimala College Thrissur with an aggregate score of 50% in Class 12. Candidates must fill out the application form and select the specialisation they are interested in. Candidates who clear the merit-based admission process are required to pay the required fee and secure their seat. The fee for BA across specialisations at Vimala College Thrissur is INR 19,100.

faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks for Vimala College?
faqs.answer: For Undergraduate Courses:Bachelor's degree in Mathematics must be at least 85% in Physics and Chemistry, and in Botany or Zoology, it must be at least 75% and 80%, respectively. At least 70% in the 12th  for BCom, at least 70% in the 12th for  BA. For BA English -12th boards.For Pg Courses:MSc English - Minimum 50% in B.Com for MCom, Minimum 60% in BSc for MSc Mathematics,   Minimum 55% in BSc for MSc Physics, Minimum of 65% in BSc for  MSc Chemistry, and Minimum 50% in BA for  MA English.Moreo

faqs.question: Can I join Vimala College directly?
faqs.answer: No, you can not join this college directly.Filling out the application via the Vimala College admissions portal is required for all categories.The official college website lists the particular eligibility requirements for each of the many undergraduate, graduate, and doctorate programs that the college offers.Attend the University of Calicut's entrance examination, provide your class 12 report card and any additional paperwork that is needed.If you are selected for counseling, please show up on the designated date and time.Seat allocation is determined by entrance exam scores,  12th percentile, seat availability, and reservations.For PG courses, give the appropriate postgraduate entrance test (CUCET for MA students, CAT/MAT for MBA students).Bring all original documentation to the counseling process, along with your qualifying exam results.Entry is determined by merit, taking into account a candidate's academic history, qualifying exam results, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Vimala College?
faqs.answer: Women candidates seeking admission at Vimala College, canapply onlineon the official website of the college. Candidates will be selected on thebasis of meritin the last qualifying examination. Seat reservation is provided as per norms set by the University of Calicut and State Govt. of Kerala. After final selection, candidates mustreport to the collegecampus with their Parent/ Guardian for admission.

faqs.question: Is admission to Vimala College entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Vimala College admissionismerit-basedfor a majority of the programme.  The college offers 16 UG courses in B.A., BSc & BCom, M.A. MSW, MCom and MSc. Few courses, such asMSW requires Entrance Testand Group Discussion process. For other courses, final selection is done on the basis ofmeritin the qualifying examination followed by aPersonal Interview

faqs.question: When is Vimala College application forms out?
faqs.answer: Every year in May or June, Vimala College issues application forms for undergraduate courses, including BA, BSc, and BCom programs.Following the release of the results of the Class 12 board test, the application procedure starts.The college website, publications, and notice board all solicit applications.For UG programs, the application deadline often falls during the third week of June.Applications for PG courses, such as MSc, MA, and MCom programs, are made available between May and June.Prior to the administration of entrance tests such as CAT, MAT, CUCET, and so on, applications are accepted.July is the deadline for PG applications.Applications for MPhil and PhD programs are accepted starting in June and run all year long.As a result, applicants should frequently visit the college's official website for the latest updates.

notes: Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

placement_data.title: Vimala College Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the NIRF report 2024 released by the college, the median package offered during UG 3-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3 LPA and INR 3.47 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 93 students were placed and 401 students opted for higher studies out of total 777 students during Vimala College UG 3-year placements 2023. Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is released. As per the report, 101 UG and 96 PG students were placed during Vimala College placements 2022. The median package for UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) courses offered during Vimala College placements 2022 Stood at INR 2.7 LPA and INR 3.6 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the highest package for B.Sc students at Vimala College, Thrissur?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Vimala College is approximately INR 10 Lacs Per Annum (LPA). 101 UG and 96 PG students were placed with a median package for UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) courses offered during college placements 2022 Stood at INR 2.7 LPA and INR 3.6 LPA.

outlook.description:
Vimala College has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Vimala College indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Vimala College's rank is #37, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vimala College's rank is #61, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Vimala College's rank is #36, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'Social work' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vimala College's rank is #26, the same as last year's rank in the 'Social work' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus life and experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available, the library was good, and classrooms were well-established and equipped with projectors. LAN connections facilitated an interactive learning environment. The fully automated central library was available. The hostel provided spacious and well-ventilated accommodations for 320 students. A modern auditorium equipped with the latest technology. The food quality standards of the hostel were okayish, and the medical facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities and an attracting garden, with good placements in IT field
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is appreciable and one of the attractive things for me. Cleanliness is also one of the notable things. The well-organized library contains a lot of books. All the classrooms are digitalized, which helps the students. Wi-Fi is also available in the college and classrooms for study purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Vimala College had very good faculty members sometimes.
reviews.review_text: Vimala College offers modern infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and spacious classrooms. Hostel provides clean rooms, nutritious food, and medical care. Sports amenities and a library with extensive resources support student development and well-being.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges of my life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are provided with a bed, an almirah to keep clothes, a study table, and a chair. All the windows were covered with mosquito nets. The food was not up to the expectations of northern people. Every month, we had to register for mess. There were 11 mess halls combined in total and students could choose any mess hall upon availability.

reviews.review_heading: The best college to join. Absolutely satisfied with our placement.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is wonderful, with all the amenities. The mess is nice, and the restrooms and rooms' infrastructure are maintained tidy and hygienic. The gym is also accessible, and there is Nescafe available for eating and drinking. It's the best hostel in every aspect. The hostel is well-kept and has a security guard on duty around the clock.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vimala College in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: We have a high security system on campus as well as in hostels. So our parents never worried about us. We were able to get nutritious foods in our hostel mess. And there are free wi-fi facilities available on our college campus. And our laboratories were too good.

reviews.review_heading: Vimala college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: Students from various places came here to do their higher education at Vimala College. It's a friendly environment to develop our skills and we have a lot of opportunities to work for our passion. We were also asked to participate in sports in addition to placements and academics.

reviews.review_heading: My postgraduate degree in Physics at vimala college.
reviews.review_text: There are big, spacious classrooms and a library present within our campus. Nearly three to four cultural events occur in a year. In our canteen, we are served hygienic food and also have a specific menu to follow every day. All modes of transportation are available from our college campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college focuses on providing the best quality education to its students.
reviews.review_text: Vimala College has good infrastructure and facilities for the B.A. Economics course. The college has all the necessary facilities for its students. The library and canteen were available on the college campus. Our college also promotes sports and provides multiple sports facilities to the students. I have not opted for the hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vimala college Autonomous Thrissur .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Vimala college Autonomous Thrissur is awesome. The building is renovated every year and the facilities available at the college are good. The college has many recreation spots. The college hostel is not good comparing to other PG hostels .

reviews.review_heading: Vimala College Autonomous, Thrissur - My overall experience.
reviews.review_text: Every classroom is Vimala College has a projector facility in each class. In the mathematics department, there is a departmental computer lab. So it is easy, accessible, and helpful for students. Computers in the lab have Wi-Fi connectivity, and students can use it, but students can't get college Wi-Fi for their personal devices. There is a large library with a garden library arranged in it. There are a lot of books in the library related to my core subject, mathematics, but there are not a wide...

reviews.review_heading: I like the hostel and the food of this University.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is too good with all the facilities available. The mess is also good. The infrastructure of the rooms and the bathrooms is kept neat and clean. Gym is also available. Nescafe is also available for eating and recreation purposes. The hostel is best in every way possible. It is properly cleaned and there is a 24*7 security guard available at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Kerala
reviews.review_text: Students get hostel facilities in the college. They get all the basic facilities in the hostel, including Wi-Fi/LAN facilities. The taste of the food in the mess is good. Many sports facilities are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Campus and hostel of this college is very wonderful.
reviews.review_text: There are hostels with single rooms, which means each student gets a single room or shared room. The diet plan is made by students of the hostel. Food quality and quantity are very good and the monthly mess fees are like 2400–2800. Security guards are always at the main gate, or security guards roam on the hostel campus. The registration process is very easy; it is done by filling out the form.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The hostel is spacious. Our college provides a separate hostel for girls. The hostel has good security. All hostels are under CCTV surveillance. The hostel rooms are spacious and good. They are well-cleaned. The food served in the mess is good. They provide a variety of food items.

Bharathidasan University popular programmes are BVoc, MCA and BCom courses. The popular programmes are designed to offer job-oriented and value-based quality education to students in Information Technology and Commercial Application Development and various other streams. At the end of each programme, the students are well-versed, particularly in various core subjects, with good knowledge of professional as well as interpersonal skills.
Bharathidasan University is ranked for its various popular programmes, and hence it is one of the top universities in India. Bharathidasan University Tiruchirappalli, offers these popular programmes on the basis of merit and entrance. reviews_list.review_title: I am highly satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: About 70 out of 100 percent of students got placed. I think the highest salary offered is around Rs. 50,000 per month, and the minimum salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month, based on their work and dedication. It is compulsory for each student to complete or undergo internships at a company, and it is compulsory for every student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides proper and hygienic hostels. It has a good library, and a digital library is also available. review_summary.college_name: Bharathidasan University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and good environment surrounded by green fields.

content.Placements: As I am studying in the second year of my college, our college conducts a lot of programs, workshops, and motivational speeches by industrial experts, which help us improve our knowledge and vision towards our career. Companies like TCS and Wipro come for campus interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Basically, the hostel is very good. It has good facilities and a good atmosphere, surrounded by a green environment. Our college hostel guardian is responsible and friendly, which is a plus point. We have good food, a good place to sleep, a good computer lab, a communication lab, and the infrastructure is very good. We also have a multifunctional library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Coimbatore.

content.Placements: Many IT companies like Accenture, Wipro, and TCS visited the campus. There was a placement platform for the students. Many top companies came, and students who got jobs were happy and enjoyed their work. They were in good positions.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a library, labs, and good classrooms. I was not a hostel student. I was a day scholar, and it was awesome. I heard from hostel students in my classroom that there were many games and sports, annual day celebrations, fests, and many other activities in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: About 70 out of 100 percent of students got placed. I think the highest salary offered is around Rs. 50,000 per month, and the minimum salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month, based on their work and dedication. It is compulsory for each student to complete or undergo internships at a company, and it is compulsory for every student.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides proper and hygienic hostels. It has a good library, and a digital library is also available. In the case of facilities, everything is top-notch as compared to other colleges around Coimbatore. It also provides free Wi-Fi and digital libraries free of cost.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college for MCA course.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students were interviewed on campus. The average salary package offered is between 10,000 and 60,000 rupees. Top companies like ICICI Pru Life, State Street, HCL India Pvt. Ltd., TCS Tata Consultancy Services, Muthoot Finance, Tata Communications, Asian Paints, and Athena Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
content.Infrastructure: More than four computer laboratories, two canteens, and historic buildings are among the many facilities. The canteens’ food is of high quality. Scholarships are available for kids from low-income families, a green and clean environment is maintained, and a free midday meal programme is provided for those in need.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Social Work (MSW) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bishop Heber College, Social Work Department.

content.Placements: All seniors get placed except for two. There are some campus placements, but most of them get placed outside campus. The starting salary ranges from Rs. 20,000 to 2–4 LPA based on the recruitment. You can be placed as a social worker, therapist, counsellor, community developer, human resources manager, or human resources executive.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and hostels are average compared to other colleges. The library is very good with an e-library. There is a very good canteen and sports facilities. You can even get a sports scholarship. Free Wi-Fi is available if you have a laptop. There are very good computer labs and other labs, such as a botany lab and labs for visual communication.

paragraphs: BDU admission processstarts with registration for the preferred course. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. The selection for most of the programmes is entrance-based. Below is step-wise admission process for Bharathidasan University:
STEP 1: BDU Application Process 2025

Candidates can collect the prospectus and the application form from the university campus or apply online. Aspirants applying for CDOE courses have to pay an application fee of INR 250 for UG courses, INR 400 for PG and INR 550 for MBA/ MCA. The application fee for PG extension centre courses is INR 500.
STEP 2: Selection

Bharathidasan University selects candidates for most of the UG and PG courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. For MBA, the university offers admission through TANCET score. CEETA PG score is considered for admission to MTech course of BDU. Besides, PhD admission is also entrance exam. Aspirants selected for PhD are also required to come for an interview round.
STEP 3: Counselling

Once the candidates are selected, they are called for counselling. For MBA and MTech,TANCET CounsellingandCEETA PG Counsellingare done. Aspirants attending university counselling must bring the specified documents for verification. Shortlisted candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

Bharathidasan University fee is a sum of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, library deposit, training and exam fee, etc. There are a few components that are one-time payable, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. faqs.question: How can I get admission to MCA at Bharathidasan University?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University admission to MCA is based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must pass BSc (Computer Science, Computer Technology, Information Technology, Information Science, Information Systems, Software Science, Software Development) or BCA to get admission in the MCA course.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MCA at Bharathidasan University?
faqs.answer: Candidates should have passed BSc (Computer Science, Computer Technology, Information Technology, Information Science, Information Systems, Software Science, Software Development) or BCA to apply for Bharathidasan University MCA course. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at later stages of admission.

faqs.question: Is MCA available at Bharathidasan University?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University offers two-year MCA course divided into four semesters. The university offers MCA through Centre for Distance and Online Education. In order to be eligible for the award of the degree the candidate shall successfully complete the course in a maximum period of four years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass BSc or BCA to apply for MCA course.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Bharathidasan University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bharathidasan University accepts admission to MBA course either through state-levelTANCETexam followed by TANCET Counselling. The university offers admission to MTech course based onCEETA PGscore. Besides, the university conducts an entrance exam for Integrated BTech + MTech and PhD courses. The entrance test will based on the basic knowledge of English, General Aptitude, Intelligence, Reasoning and Computer/ Internet awareness of a candidate in addition to the respective branch domain in the MTech.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Bharathidasan University distance education admission?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University Distance Education admissions will open online. Till now, no schedule has been released by the university. Once the application portal is live, candidates can apply online for their preferred course. CODE offers UG and PG courses such as BA, BSc, BCom, MA, MSc, etc. in online or distance education mode. The admission to most of the courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for PhD at Bharathidasan University?
faqs.answer: At Bharathidasan University, the eligibility for PhD is to post-graduate with 50% aggregate from a recognised University (for candidates belonging to 50% SC/ST).

faqs.question: How are the placements at Bharathidasan University?
faqs.answer: Bharathidasan University offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During Bharathidasan University placements 2023, a total of 59 UG 3-years and 318 PG 2-years students were placed in reputed companies. Further, the median package offered to UG 3-year and PG 2-year students during Bharathidasan University placements 2023 was INR 1.80 LPA and INR 2.16 LPA, respectively. The key highlights of Bharathidasan University placements for the Class of 2022 and 2023 in the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Median package (UG 3-years) INR 1.56 LPA INR 1.80 LPA Total students (UG 3-years) 93 94 Total students placed (UG 3-years) 31 59 Median package (PG 2-years) INR 2.40 LPA INR 2.16 LPA Total students (PG 2-years) 577 800 Total students placed (PG 2-years) 235 318 Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Bharathidasan University NIRF report 2024.

Meanwhile, let’s take a look at the median packages offered during Bharathidasan University placements 2023 in the table below: Course Median Package (2023) UG 3-years (BSc, BCom, BBA, BCA, etc.) INR 1.80 LPA PG 2-years (MBA, MCA, MCom, etc.) INR 2.16 LPA PG-Integrated 5-years INR 1.50 LPA PG 6-years INR 2.64 LPA Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Bharathidasan University NIRF report 2024.

highlights.description: Bharathidasan University is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #61 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Overall, #36 under University, and #16 under State Public University. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Bharathidasan University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 9th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
5th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Bharathidasan University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Bharathidasan University's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Bharathidasan University fell 6 ranks to #61 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Bharathidasan University's rank is #36, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'State Public University' category have displayed a stable trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Bharathidasan University's rank is #16, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel.description: Bharathidasan University's hostel has a total of 1460 students staying in the hostels. Among them 694 are boys and 766 are girls. There are separately integrated dining halls for boys and girls. The hostel rooms are provided with fans, good lighting, adequate water facility, recreation centre, playing ground, newspapers and magazines. Each hostel is provided with a television and cable connectivity. Similarly, all the hostels have Wi-Fi facility. The hostels are provided with a good hygienic cooking facility and spacious dining halls. There is 24 hours watch and ward for women’s hostels. Each hostel is provided with hot water facility in the bathrooms. The hostels have grievance redressal Committee and purchase committee which meet once in a month. The hostels are provided with a telephone facility to receive calls from outside.

library.description: Bharathidasan University's library is well furnished with all resources including e-library resources. The Library has separate halls for housing the books, journals, magazines and reference books in addition to a big and well-furnished reading hall. In terms of learning resources, the library has a good collection of books and e-books in addition to subscribing a number of journals and audio-video cassettes. The library has INFLIBNET and DELNET facilities. The UGC Infonet facility helps to access more than 10000 e-resources including thousands of e-journals. Through the university's digital library, the students and faculty members can have access to more than 5000 back volumes and 7000 electronic books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Swami Dayananda College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and good environment surrounded by green fields.
reviews.review_text: Basically, the hostel is very good. It has good facilities and a good atmosphere, surrounded by a green environment. Our college hostel guardian is responsible and friendly, which is a plus point. We have good food, a good place to sleep, a good computer lab, a communication lab, and the infrastructure is very good. We also have a multifunctional library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Coimbatore.
reviews.review_text: The college had a library, labs, and good classrooms. I was not a hostel student. I was a day scholar, and it was awesome. I heard from hostel students in my classroom that there were many games and sports, annual day celebrations, fests, and many other activities in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides proper and hygienic hostels. It has a good library, and a digital library is also available. In the case of facilities, everything is top-notch as compared to other colleges around Coimbatore. It also provides free Wi-Fi and digital libraries free of cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for MCA course.
reviews.review_text: More than four computer laboratories, two canteens, and historic buildings are among the many facilities. The canteens’ food is of high quality. Scholarships are available for kids from low-income families, a green and clean environment is maintained, and a free midday meal programme is provided for those in need.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bishop Heber CollegeReviewed on 17 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Bishop Heber College, Social Work Department.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and hostels are average compared to other colleges. The library is very good with an e-library. There is a very good canteen and sports facilities. You can even get a sports scholarship. Free Wi-Fi is available if you have a laptop. There are very good computer labs and other labs, such as a botany lab and labs for visual communication.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 13 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is 7 out of 10, but everything has its own pros and cons, so you’ve to learn how to survive.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of facilities. We can have the respected Wi-Fi, labs, and library time. Recently, our college time has changed, and we are getting a lot of time to explore our campus. The food is great, and we get equal and tasty food on campus at a cheap rate.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 26 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: 180 years old and a heritage college in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities include more than 4 computer labs, 2 canteens, and old and heritage buildings. The quality of food in the canteen is good. Free mid day meals scheme for the financially backward class, Scholarships for financially backward students, and a Green and fresh environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 16 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Moderate satisfied with faculty and absolutely dissatisfied with fee structure.
reviews.review_text: In our department, classrooms are well organised and neat. Wi-Fi is not provided in our department. Library is good. Hostel facility is nice. Food quality is better but weekly two times chicken will be provided in the hostel. College provide more care for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by J.J. College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 6 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Raising their standards to higher.
reviews.review_text: Administration of the college focuses on the goals of the students, and arranges the possible things required for achieving them. Their educational standards are too good. But requires improvement by means of providing proper facilities. But it's one of the underrated colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bishop Heber CollegeReviewed on 2 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The ambiance is too good.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the whole college and hostels. It provides good communication. They are giving more importance to sports, NCC, and NSS. There are camps, and field work is more important. There are more than 30 clubs at the college. I truly recommend this college. Canteen is too good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 31 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A Heritage Campus with Strong Academics, Supportive Faculty, and Good Placements.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts the Arrupe Library housing over 160,000 volumes including rare collections and more than 200 print journals. There are also 15+ departmental libraries supporting varied faculty and student needs. A robust IT infrastructure includes the Jerome Centre for ICT multiple computer laboratories (including four dedicated labs with 190 systems at the Ehrhart Centre), 24/7 Wi-Fi, an ICT centre, and language labs. The college offers several boys' hostels (Live's House, New Hostel, Sacred...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan College Of Arts And Science For Women - DSCASWReviewed on 28 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements, best faculty members, excellent infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: We have a library, cafeteria, auditorium, spacious classrooms, playground, Wi-Fi, labs, indoor sports hall, yoga hall, and a beautiful garden. Our college provides a good hostel. The college canteen and mess provide good food. Our college has medical facilities for students and all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for MBA course.
reviews.review_text: Our college ranks among the top institutions in the nation regarding services and facilities. It offers boundless Wi-Fi access across the campus. Its velocity is 200 Mbps. Our college offers amenities such as a library, student accommodation, and more. Our college is equipped with air conditioning. The accommodation is excellent. The student body managers the mess menu, resulting in monthly changes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Com. Course.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, it is the best college. Wi-Fi is supposed to be provided throughout the campus, but it is still not available. The hostel needs to be improved considerably. Institutions around the world have not used the same hostel in the same way for the last 50 years. Rooms should be properly arranged and locked. Overall, some improvements need to be made.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by St.Joseph's College, TiruchirappalliReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college ever for the M.Sc. In the Chemistry course.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well-structured and is currently being created. Healthcare and athletic facilities are exceptional. You will receive 1 GB of data every day over Wi-Fi, as well as unlimited call services. Even messed-up food tastes good. There are 16 hostels, with 12 designed for boys and 4 for girls. Mandakini is a newly developed hotel that focuses on newcomers this year.

admission_process.title: Centre for Distance and Online Education, Lovely Professional University Admission Process 2024

paragraphs: Centre for Distance and Online Education, Lovely Professional University admission is entrance based for courses offered at UG, PG, and Certificate levels. Some of the popular exams accepted by the institution for admission are ISC, CBSE 12th, and PSEB 12th, etc. The institution offers 16 courses to the students in the stream of Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, and Science, among others. At the UG level, some of the popularCentre for Distance and Online Education, Lovely Professional University coursesinclude BCA, B.E. / B.Tech, and B.A. and at the PG level, the institution offers, MBA/PGDM, MCA, and M.Com, among others. Candidates interested in Centre for Distance and Online Education, Lovely Professional University admission 2024 can check the fees and other details below:
lists: Centre for Distance and Online Education, Lovely Professional University Fees: The total tuition fees for UG courses range between INR 90,000 - INR 680,000 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 60,000 - INR 190,000. Other than the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. This fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

Centre for Distance and Online Education, Lovely Professional University Course Duration: The duration for UG courses offered at Centre for Distance and Online Education, Lovely Professional University is 3 years and the same for PG courses is 2 years.

The flagship courses offered at the Nitte School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design are BDes and MDes. fees_and_eligibility.overview: NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design offers UG degrees in two courses, namely BSc (Fashion and Apparel Design) and BSc (Interior Design and Decoration). Other than these, the institute offers diploma in two specialisations which include Fashion Design and Interior Design and the PG Diploma in four specialisations. The institute offers a one-year online diploma in two specialisations, namely Fashion Design and Interior Design. The course duration of the BSc programme is three years, whereas diploma and PG diploma are offered with a one-year duration. Below mentioned are the details about along with eligibility criteria and course fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates with a 70% in Class 12 can apply for NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design UG courses. The institute accepts candidates who have passed Class 12 from a recognised board and have attained an overall aggregate of 50%. There is 5% relaxation in the aggregate for SC, ST and OBC category candidates.
faqs.question: Can I apply for NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design with 70% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design is a moderately competitive institute to get into, as its acceptance rate stands at 50%. This figure tells us that almost 50 out of every 100 applicants manage to get enrolled in the institute, which is more than half of all the applicants. Therefore, once an applicant fulfills NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design admission requirements i.e., competitive grades, standardised test scores, English language requirements as well as relevant documents, they are most likely to secure an admission in the institute. However, students must not take this lightly and apply to the institute within the deadlines in order to get enrolled as a student.
faqs.question: Is NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design hard to get?

individual_reviews.title: Review on Nitte school of fashion technology and interior design .

content.Placements: The placements here are really good. They guarantee us that while taking admission. I have also heard from many people that this college has very good placements. Last year, the placement rate was 100%. There are even paid internship programs from companies like Manish Malhotra.
content.Infrastructure: We have all the facilities we need inside the campus. There are two CAD labs with Wi-Fi that we can use if we need to look up something. There is a library in our department that consists of all the books we need as fashion students. The classrooms are smart board-enabled classes. Each and every room has a smart board.

admission_process.title: NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The institute conducts an entrance exam to shortlist candidates.NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Designoffers courses at UG and PG levels in the Design field. Interested candidates can apply online for their preferred course.

The institute offers four courses in full-time mode including BDes and MDes. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to get admission in the institute. Below areNITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
- Interior Design
- Fashion Design
- Interior Design
- Fashion Design
Download:NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design Brochure 2025

NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design fee varies course-wise. The total fee is a sum of components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Below is course-wise fee for NITTE School of Fashion Technology:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design offers admission to UG and PG courses based on entrance exam score. Admission for all Indian students is as per the norms of theBangalore City Universityand Government of Karnataka (GoK). Aspirants must follow the below steps to get a seat in institute:
STEP 1: NITTE School of Fashion Technology Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility criteria to apply for a course. Candidates need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

The school shortlists candidates for UG and PG courses based on entrance exam conducted by NSFTID. The college admits students through Entrance tests conducted by college under Management quota. The entrance test assess the candidates' aptitude, creativity, and knowledge in the relevant subjects.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection process is complete, selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute. Aspirants also need to bring the specified documents for verification.

courses_data.name: NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design offers Diploma in Interior Design. The duration of the programme is one year. To be eligible for admission to the programme, candidates must meet the basic eligibility requirements of the programme as follows: Pass Class 10 or II PUC or Class (Arts, Science, or commerce).

faqs.question: Is Diploma course available at NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design?
faqs.answer: Yes, Diploma course is available at NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design in a full-time mode. Candidates can pursue this programme in the stream of Interior Design. Admission to Diploma courses is subject to candidates's scores obtained in Class 12.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for Diploma course at NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design?
faqs.answer: Candidates after completing Class 10 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate in Arts, Science or Commerce stream can apply for NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design Diploma courses. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, the selection for Diploma courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Can I apply for NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design with 70% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates with a 70% in Class 12 can apply for NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design UG courses. The institute accepts candidates who have passed Class 12 from a recognised board and have attained an overall aggregate of 50%. There is 5% relaxation in the aggregate for SC, ST and OBC category candidates.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design?
faqs.answer: Candidates are offered seat in NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design BSc and MSc programme based on a written test. The entrance test evaluates the candidates' aptitude, creativity, and knowledge in the relevant subjects. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. Once the selection process is over, shortlisted candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design?
faqs.answer: No, the college does not offer direct admission to candidates. NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design admissions are primarily entrance-based. NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design shortlists candidates for UG and PG courses based on entrance exam conducted by NSFTID. The college admits students through Entrance tests conducted by college under Management quota.

faqs.question: How many marks are required to get admission in NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to get admission in the institute. Aspirants need to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below are NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design course-wise eligibility:Course NameCommon EligibilityBScII PUC or Class 12 in Arts, Science or Commerce stream with at least 45% aggregateMScGraduates in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates)DiplomaClass 10 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate in Arts, Science or Commerce stream

placement_data.title: NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design offers placement assistance to all of its students. The institute has an active placement team that organize campus recruitment training process to train the students through various in-house and out-of-the-house training sessions. The placement team actively engages in connecting students with Indian Business Houses, Multinational Organizations and International Groups towards summer internships, live projects and final placements.

The top recruiters of NITTE School of Fashion Technology and Interior Design placements included Fab India, Homelane, Livspace, Gokaldas Exports, Bombay Rayon Fashions, Amazon, Rare Rabbit, Shahi Exports, Caliko Buyers Office, Huru Clothing, Aantarika Design Studio, Atkins, Square Yards , etc.
